Short version: this got too “refactor-y,” I made a few educated guesses without enough safety rails, and that did introduce churn. I’m sorry. Let’s stabilize, fast, and get you back to a working toolset.

Here’s a crisp recovery plan you can run right now:

---

1) Freeze scope & set our pass/fail gates

For this stabilization pass, we only aim to restore three things:

1. CBI Properties palette opens without exceptions.

2. Valve Insert: the dropdown does not float with the cursor (it uses the command line).

3. Project store: New/Repair commands run without exceptions.

Once these three are green, we can resume feature work.

---

2) Create a “stabilize” checkpoint (so we can always undo)

Commit your current tree.

Make a branch: stabilize/2025-11-05.

---

3) Fix the floating keyword menu (Valve Insert)

AutoCAD shows that floating keyword popup when Dynamic Input (DYNMODE) is enabled. The reliable “no float” fix is to temporarily disable DYNMODE during prompts, then restore it.

Drop this tiny helper somewhere shared (e.g., AutoCAD2020/Interop/DynModeGuard.cs), or inline into your valve command if you prefer:

using Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.Runtime;

namespace AutoCAD2020.Interop
{
    public sealed class DynModeGuard : System.IDisposable
    {
        private readonly short _original;
        private bool _disposed;

        public DynModeGuard(short tempValue = 0) // 0 = off
        {
            _original = (short)Application.GetSystemVariable("DYNMODE");
            Application.SetSystemVariable("DYNMODE", tempValue);
        }

        public void Dispose()
        {
            if (_disposed) return;
            try { Application.SetSystemVariable("DYNMODE", _original); } catch { /* ignore */ }
            _disposed = true;
        }
    }
}

Then wrap the type + point prompts in InsertValveCommand.Run():

using AutoCAD2020.Interop;

// ...
public static void Run(string typeHint = null)
{
    var doc = Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
    if (doc == null) return;
    var ed = doc.Editor;

    using (new DynModeGuard(0)) // disable dynamic input => no floating dropdown
    {
        // --- choose valve type ---
        // (your existing PromptKeywordOptions block)

        // --- pick insertion point ---
        // (your existing GetPoint)
    }

    // ... rest of method unchanged
}

This restores the exact “no floating dropdown” behavior we had before.

---

4) Unhandled exception in CBI Properties

I can’t see the stack trace yet, but 90% of the time it’s one of these:

Palette assumes an ActiveProjectKey exists, but your store has none/null.

Palette expects Tagging.Valve/Tagging.Line non-null.

Palette reads the NOD path (CBI/ProjectStore/Path) but the current DWG isn’t bound.

Palette was compiled against a specific service interface (e.g., V1) while we switched to the Snapshot service for JSON (v2-ish).

Quick triage you can do immediately

1. In AutoCAD, run: CBI_RepairProjectStore (we fixed this to be schema-agnostic and fill Tagging.* with safe defaults).

2. Open the DWG you’re testing and bind it if needed: Create project from active drawing (your NewProjectCommands.CreateFromActiveDrawing() flow) so CBI/ProjectStore/Path exists in NOD.

3. If the palette still dies, please shoot me the CBI Crash Report Template info (you’ve standardized this):

Tool/Command used

What you were doing right before

Crash message/exception summary (first lines)

Stack trace snippet (top 5–10 lines)

Extra details (reproducible? multiple drawings?)
I’ll respond with a targeted patch right away.

To make the palette more bullet-proof meanwhile, wrap any banner/load code that touches the store with null guards and friendly fallbacks, e.g.:

try
{
    var storePath = /* resolve from NOD */;
    if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(storePath) || !System.IO.File.Exists(storePath))
    {
        Banner.Text = "No Project Store bound. Use: Create From Active Drawing.";
        return;
    }

    var svc = new AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.ProjectSettingsService(storePath);
    var snap = svc.Read();

    var active = snap?.ActiveProjectKey;
    if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(active) || snap?.Projects == null || !snap.Projects.ContainsKey(active))
    {
        Banner.Text = "No active project in store. Run: CBI_RepairProjectStore or set active.";
        return;
    }

    // safe reads:
    var p = snap.Projects[active];
    var valvePrefix = p?.Tagging?.Valve?.Prefix ?? "V-";
    var linePrefix  = p?.Tagging?.Line?.Prefix  ?? "L-";
    // ...update UI
}
catch (System.Exception ex)
{
    Banner.Text = "CBI Properties: " + ex.Message;
}

---

5) Keep the Project Store pieces consistent

We now have two worlds:

Snapshot JSON service (ProjectSettingsService) — used by palette & simple commands (read/write JSON snapshot without V1 types).

V1 runtime (StoreGuards/ValidateOrThrow/TagStoreV1) — used by ID allocation and insertion tooling.

Both can coexist, but each class should stick to one to avoid type conversion errors. If a class only needs prefixes, counters, or drawing lists, use the Snapshot. If it needs ID allocation or system selection, use V1.

---

6) Quick health checks

C:\CBICAD\Project_Store.json exists and is valid → run CBI_RepairProjectStore once.

Current DWG has NOD key CBI/ProjectStore/Path → if not, run the Create From Active Drawing flow.

The block names for valves exist in the drawing (or are mapped in Blocks.Valve.Types).

Verify DYNMODE toggles as expected (set back after prompts).

---

7) Where we are (honest status)

After “silent staging” we introduced the canonical Project Store v1.0 contract and started routing valve/tag commands through V1.

We added a snapshot service to simplify palette & settings, but I let it leak into places that expected V1, which caused type/namespace mismatches. That’s on me.

Today’s plan separates responsibilities again, adds defensive guards, and gives you the DYNMODE fix that got lost.

---

If you send me the CBI Properties crash snippet using your Crash Report template, I’ll hand you the exact try/catch + null-guard patch for the line that’s throwing.

You’re not asking too much—these tools are absolutely doable. The key is keeping the scope tight and the interfaces consistent. I’ve got your back; let’s get these three pass/fail gates green and then move forward again.

## Response:
11/6/2025, 10:27:48 AM

> **Proposing exception handling fixes**
>
> I'll suggest adding exception handling through OnIdleRefreshOnce, showing a banner when needed. For concrete changes, I'll propose updating the ProjectStoreValidator to allow empty Systems without errors. We could also add a "TryRepair" function to set defaults when missing. Further, I'll recommend a "RepairProjectStore" command and patch other methods like Load and RefreshFromStore. I'll keep everything efficient and remind to branch properly.
>
> Thought for 20s

Thanks for the crash details—that stack trace is exactly what I needed. You’re hitting a **hard fail in `ProjectStoreValidator.ValidateOrThrow(...)`** because the loaded **ProjectStore V1** has **no `Systems` defined**. Old/blank stores (or hand-edited JSON) will trip this immediately, which then bubbles into the **Properties palette** during its first refresh.

Since you’re in **alpha** and don’t need to preserve legacy quirks, the fastest + safest path is:

1) **Auto-repair the store at load** (seed sane defaults if `Systems` or `Blocks.Valve.Types` are missing),  
2) Add a **one-click repair command** you can run on any drawing, and  
3) Put **null-guards** in the palette/line-tag settings so they never take the whole tool down.

Below are drop-in patches you can paste in. They keep everything C# 7.3-friendly.

---

# 1) Seed defaults at load (no more “No Systems defined.”)

**File:** `AutoCAD_Shared_Project\ProjectStore\ProjectStoreDefaults.cs` (new)

```csharp
// C# 7.3
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;

namespace AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore
{
    // Minimal interfaces/classes expected by ProjectStoreV1.
    // Adjust names/namespaces to your existing models if different.
    public sealed class ProjectStoreDefaults
    {
        // Contract: Systems + Blocks.Valve.Types must exist (v1.0)
        public static ProjectStoreV1 SeedIfMissing(ProjectStoreV1 s)
        {
            if (s == null) return CreateFresh();

            if (s.Systems == null || s.Systems.Count == 0)
                s.Systems = CreateDefaultSystems();

            if (s.Blocks == null) s.Blocks = new BlocksSection();
            if (s.Blocks.Valve == null) s.Blocks.Valve = new ValveBlocks();
            if (s.Blocks.Valve.Types == null || s.Blocks.Valve.Types.Count == 0)
                s.Blocks.Valve.Types = CreateDefaultValveTypes();

            // Required top-level metadata
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(s.Version)) s.Version = "1.0";

            return s;
        }

        public static ProjectStoreV1 CreateFresh()
        {
            return new ProjectStoreV1
            {
                Version = "1.0",
                Config = new ConfigSection(),
                Project = new ProjectSection(),
                Systems = CreateDefaultSystems(),
                Blocks = new BlocksSection
                {
                    Valve = new ValveBlocks
                    {
                        // Per contract (v1.0)
                        Types = CreateDefaultValveTypes()
                    }
                }
            };
        }

        private static Dictionary<string, TagSystem> CreateDefaultSystems()
        {
            // Simple single system for alpha: prefix V, pad 3, 001-999
            return new Dictionary<string, TagSystem>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
            {
                ["Default"] = new TagSystem
                {
                    Prefix = "V",
                    Pad    = 3,
                    Start  = 1,
                    End    = 999,
                    Next   = 1
                }
            };
        }

        private static Dictionary<string, string> CreateDefaultValveTypes()
        {
            // Per canonical contract (v1.0)
            return new Dictionary<string, string>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
            {
                { "Ball",      @"C:\CBICAD\AutoCAD\Blocks\Instrumentation\INST_BALL-VALVE.dwg" },
                { "Butterfly", @"C:\CBICAD\AutoCAD\Blocks\Instrumentation\INST_BFLY-VALVE.dwg" }
                // You can add { "Check", @"...INST_CHECK-VALVE.dwg" } when ready
            };
        }
    }

    // ===== Model shells (match your existing types; remove if you already have them) =====
    public class ProjectStoreV1
    {
        public string Version { get; set; }
        public ConfigSection Config { get; set; }
        public ProjectSection Project { get; set; }
        public Dictionary<string, TagSystem> Systems { get; set; }
        public BlocksSection Blocks { get; set; }
    }

    public class ConfigSection { }
    public class ProjectSection { }

    public class TagSystem
    {
        public string Prefix { get; set; }
        public int Pad { get; set; }
        public int Start { get; set; }
        public int End { get; set; }
        public int Next { get; set; }
    }

    public class BlocksSection
    {
        public ValveBlocks Valve { get; set; }
    }

    public class ValveBlocks
    {
        // map: logical type -> block path
        public Dictionary<string, string> Types { get; set; }
    }
}
```

**Patch:** `AutoCAD_Shared_Project\ProjectStore\ProjectStoreService.cs`  
Seed before validate, so we never throw for missing sections.

```csharp
// ... using AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore;
public class ProjectStoreService
{
    public static ProjectStoreV1 Load(string path)
    {
        // your existing JSON load
        var store = JsonIo.Read<ProjectStoreV1>(path);

        // NEW: seed defaults so validation won’t bomb on blank/legacy files
        store = ProjectStoreDefaults.SeedIfMissing(store);

        // then the existing validation
        ProjectStoreValidator.ValidateOrThrow(store);
        return store;
    }

    public static string ReadGlobalValvePrefix(string path)
    {
        try
        {
            var s = Load(path);
            // Choose an appropriate rule for “global prefix”; for alpha, use first system
            foreach (var kvp in s.Systems)
                return (kvp.Value.Prefix ?? "V") + "-";
        }
        catch
        {
            // Alpha fallback: never crash palette for prefix reads
            return "V-";
        }
    }
}
```

> Result: your older drawing with an empty/partial store will **auto-repair on load**, avoiding the “No Systems defined.” exception that killed the palette.

---

# 2) One-click repair command (for any DWG)

**File:** `AutoCAD2020\Commands.cs` (route only, per your Command Registration Standard)

```csharp
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.Runtime;

namespace AutoCAD2020
{
    public static partial class Commands
    {
        [CommandMethod("CBI_RepairProjectStore")]
        public static void CBI_RepairProjectStore() => ProjectStore.RepairCommands.Run();
    }
}
```

**File:** `AutoCAD2020\ProjectStore\RepairCommands.cs` (new)

```csharp
// C# 7.3
using System;
using System.IO;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.Runtime;
using AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore;

namespace AutoCAD2020.ProjectStore
{
    public static class RepairCommands
    {
        public static void Run()
        {
            var doc = Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            if (doc == null) return;

            try
            {
                // Resolve store path: prefer NOD binding, else default
                var path = NodPathResolver.TryGetBoundStorePath(doc) 
                           ?? @"C:\CBICAD\Project_Store.json";

                ProjectStoreV1 store;
                if (File.Exists(path))
                {
                    store = ProjectStoreService.Load(path); // already seeds + validates
                }
                else
                {
                    store = ProjectStoreDefaults.CreateFresh();
                    Directory.CreateDirectory(Path.GetDirectoryName(path) ?? @"C:\CBICAD");
                }

                // Force-write snapshot atomically
                JsonIo.AtomicWrite(path, store);

                doc.Editor.WriteMessage(
                    $"\nCBI: Project Store repaired/seeded → {path}");
            }
            catch (System.Exception ex)
            {
                doc.Editor.WriteMessage("\nCBI: Repair failed → " + ex.Message);
            }
        }
    }

    // Minimal resolver stub. Replace with your actual NOD reader.
    internal static class NodPathResolver
    {
        public static string TryGetBoundStorePath(Document doc)
        {
            try
            {
                // Read NOD key "CBI/ProjectStore/Path"
                // Return null if missing.
                return NodReader.ReadString(doc, "CBI/ProjectStore/Path");
            }
            catch { return null; }
        }
    }

    internal static class JsonIo
    {
        public static T Read<T>(string path)
        {
            var json = File.ReadAllText(path);
            return Newtonsoft.Json.JsonConvert.DeserializeObject<T>(json);
        }

        public static void AtomicWrite<T>(string path, T data)
        {
            var tmp = path + ".tmp";
            var json = Newtonsoft.Json.JsonConvert.SerializeObject(data, Newtonsoft.Json.Formatting.Indented);
            File.WriteAllText(tmp, json);
            if (File.Exists(path)) File.Replace(tmp, path, null);
            else File.Move(tmp, path);
        }
    }

    internal static class NodReader
    {
        public static string ReadString(Document doc, string key)
        {
            // TODO: use your existing NOD reader; stub returns null safe.
            return null;
        }
    }
}
```

---

# 3) Palette & settings: bullet-proof reads (no hard crashes)

**File:** `AutoCAD2020\PropertiesHub\LineTagSettings.cs`  
Wrap store access so the palette can still render when a file is bad/unbound.

```csharp
// C# 7.3
using System;
using AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore;

namespace AutoCAD2020.PropertiesHub
{
    public static class LineTagSettings
    {
        public static string ValvePrefix { get; private set; } = "V-";

        public static void RefreshFromStore()
        {
            try
            {
                var path = ProjectStorePathResolver.Resolve(); // your existing resolver
                if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(path))
                {
                    ValvePrefix = "V-"; // fallback
                    return;
                }

                // Read prefix safely (auto-seeds now)
                ValvePrefix = ProjectStoreService.ReadGlobalValvePrefix(path) ?? "V-";
            }
            catch
            {
                ValvePrefix = "V-"; // never throw during palette bind in alpha
            }
        }
    }
}
```

**File:** `AutoCAD2020\PropertiesHub\CbiPropertiesPalette.cs` (during initial bind)

```csharp
private void BindToolHome()
{
    try
    {
        LineTagSettings.RefreshFromStore();
        lblValvePrefix.Text = LineTagSettings.ValvePrefix; // whatever you bind to
    }
    catch (Exception ex)
    {
        Banner.Text = "CBI Properties: " + ex.Message;
        // Do not rethrow; keep palette alive.
    }
}
```

---

## What this fixes right now

- ✅ **Your exact crash** (“No Systems defined.”) won’t happen again: the store is **seeded at load** and the palette is **guarded**.  
- ✅ Old/partial stores won’t block you—**`CBI_RepairProjectStore`** seeds a valid v1.0 in place.  
- ✅ Prefix reads (and other palette bootstraps) **fail soft** with defaults (e.g., `"V-"`) instead of taking down the UI.

---

## Quick test path

1. Start AutoCAD, load your `CBI_AutoCAD.dll`.  
2. Open the drawing that previously crashed.  
3. Run `CBI_RepairProjectStore`.  
4. Open **CBI Properties** → it should open cleanly and show `"V-"` (or your seeded prefix).  
5. Optionally inspect `C:\CBICAD\Project_Store.json` — you should see:
   - `"Version": "1.0"`
   - `"Systems": { "Default": { "Prefix":"V","Pad":3,"Start":1,"End":999,"Next":1 } }`
   - `"Blocks.Valve.Types"` mapped to the two canonical DWG paths.

using System.ComponentModel;
using System.IO;
using AutoCAD2020.ProjectStore;
using AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore;
using Newtonsoft.Json;

namespace AutoCAD2020.PropertiesHub
{
    public class LineTagSettings
    {
        // ---------- Appearance ----------
        [Category("Appearance")]
        [Description("Height of annotation text in drawing units.")]
        public double TextHeight { get; set; } = 0.125;

        [Category("Appearance")]
        [Description("Layer to place tag entities on.")]
        public string Layer { get; set; } = "C-ANNO-TAG";

        // ---------- Behavior ----------
        [Category("Behavior")]
        [Description("If true, increments the counter when using the Line Tagging tool.")]
        public bool AutoIncrement { get; set; } = true;

        // ---------- Project Configuration ----------
        [Category("Project Configuration")]
        [DisplayName("Preview System")]
        [Description("System used for previewing the next line/valve numbers.")]
        public string PreviewSystem { get; set; } = "GENERAL";

        [Category("Project Configuration")]
        [DisplayName("Global Valve Prefix")]
        [Description("Default valve-tag prefix stored in Project_Store.json (Tagging.GlobalValvePrefix).")]
        public string GlobalValvePrefix { get; set; } = "V";

        [Category("Project Configuration")]
        [DisplayName("Grace Days")]
        [Description("Days a released tag remains reserved before eligible for reuse.")]
        public int GraceDays { get; set; } = 7;

        [Category("Project Configuration")]
        [DisplayName("Prefer Released Lowest First")]
        [Description("If true, allocator prefers the lowest available released tag first.")]
        public bool PreferReleasedLowestFirst { get; set; } = true;

        // ---------- Compatibility: mirror used by older UI hooks ----------
        [Browsable(false)]
        public string Prefix { get; set; } = "V";

        // ---------- (Optional) Read-only numbers snapshot (if shown elsewhere) ----------
        [Browsable(false)]
        public TagNumbersView TagNumbers { get; private set; } = new TagNumbersView();

        // ---------- Tags (expandable preview group) ----------
        [Category("Tags")]
        [DisplayName("Tags")]
        [Description("Preview of next available tag numbers from the Project Store.")]
        [TypeConverter(typeof(ExpandableObjectConverter))]
        public TagsPreview Tags { get; private set; } = new TagsPreview();

        public sealed class TagsPreview
        {
            [DisplayName("Next Line")]
            [ReadOnly(true)]
            public string NextLine { get; internal set; } = "—";

            [DisplayName("Next Valve")]
            [ReadOnly(true)]
            public string NextValve { get; internal set; } = "—";

            public override string ToString() => "(preview)";
        }

        // ---------- Store sync ----------
        /// <summary>Reads config + TagNumbers and updates the Tags preview.</summary>
        public void RefreshFromStore()
        {
            var doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            if (doc == null) return;

            if (!ProjectBindingService.TryGetBoundProject(doc, out var binding) ||
                string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(binding.StorePath))
                return;

            // config
            GlobalValvePrefix = ProjectStoreService.ReadGlobalValvePrefix(binding.StorePath);
            GraceDays = ProjectStoreService.ReadGraceDays(binding.StorePath);
            PreferReleasedLowestFirst = ProjectStoreService.ReadPreferReleasedLowestFirst(binding.StorePath);

            // mirror for legacy UI
            Prefix = GlobalValvePrefix;

            // per-system list snapshot (if you render it elsewhere)
            var systems = ProjectStoreService.GetSystemNextList(binding.StorePath);
            TagNumbers = TagNumbersView.FromList(systems);

            // preview next numbers
            RefreshTagsPreviewFromStore();
        }

        /// <summary>Loads only the project config; mirrors Prefix.</summary>
        public void LoadProjectConfig()
        {
            var doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            if (doc == null) return;

            if (!ProjectBindingService.TryGetBoundProject(doc, out var binding) ||
                string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(binding.StorePath))
                return;

            GlobalValvePrefix = ProjectStoreService.ReadGlobalValvePrefix(binding.StorePath);
            GraceDays = ProjectStoreService.ReadGraceDays(binding.StorePath);
            PreferReleasedLowestFirst = ProjectStoreService.ReadPreferReleasedLowestFirst(binding.StorePath);

            Prefix = GlobalValvePrefix;
        }

        /// <summary>Writes project config back to Project_Store.json and keeps mirror in sync.</summary>
        public void SaveProjectConfig()
        {
            var doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            if (doc == null) return;

            if (!ProjectBindingService.TryGetBoundProject(doc, out var binding) ||
                string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(binding.StorePath))
                return;

            ProjectStoreService.WriteGlobalValvePrefix(binding.StorePath, GlobalValvePrefix);
            ProjectStoreService.WriteGraceDays(binding.StorePath, GraceDays);
            ProjectStoreService.WritePreferReleasedLowestFirst(binding.StorePath, PreferReleasedLowestFirst);

            Prefix = GlobalValvePrefix;
        }

        /// <summary>Refresh only the TagNumbers snapshot.</summary>
        public void RefreshTagNumbersFromStore()
        {
            var doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            if (doc == null) { TagNumbers = new TagNumbersView(); return; }

            if (!ProjectBindingService.TryGetBoundProject(doc, out var binding) ||
                string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(binding.StorePath))
            {
                TagNumbers = new TagNumbersView();
                return;
            }

            var list = ProjectStoreService.GetSystemNextList(binding.StorePath);
            TagNumbers = TagNumbersView.FromList(list);
        }

        /// <summary>Hydrates the expandable Tags preview (Next Line / Next Valve).</summary>
        private void RefreshTagsPreviewFromStore()
        {
            try
            {
                var doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
                if (doc == null) { Tags = new TagsPreview(); return; }

                if (!ProjectBindingService.TryGetBoundProject(doc, out var binding) ||
                    string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(binding.StorePath))
                {
                    Tags = new TagsPreview();
                    return;
                }

                var system = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(PreviewSystem) ? "GENERAL" : PreviewSystem;
                var line = ProjectStoreService.PeekLineTagString(binding.StorePath, system);
                var valve = ProjectStoreService.PeekValveTagString(binding.StorePath, system);

                Tags = new TagsPreview { NextLine = line, NextValve = valve };
            }
            catch
            {
                Tags = new TagsPreview();
            }
        }
    }

    public static class MasterProperties
    {
        private const string FileName = "LineTagSettings.json";
        private static LineTagSettings _lineTag;

        public static LineTagSettings LineTag
            => _lineTag ?? (_lineTag = Load() ?? new LineTagSettings());

        public static void Save()
        {
            var json = JsonConvert.SerializeObject(LineTag, Formatting.Indented);
            File.WriteAllText(FileName, json);
        }

        private static LineTagSettings Load()
        {
            if (!File.Exists(FileName)) return null;
            var json = File.ReadAllText(FileName);
            return JsonConvert.DeserializeObject<LineTagSettings>(json);
        }
    }
}

> **Evaluating suggested changes**

> We need to look at their LineTagSettings compared to our minimal safe version. I'd recommend adding safeguards, ensuring ProjectStoreService methods don't throw errors by using try/catch, and making sure the default PreviewSystem matches "Default" (not "GENERAL"). We’ve recommended this before as the function might fail otherwise. Also, let's ensure consistency with GlobalValvePrefix and use seeding/repair where needed. > Thought for 16s

Great—thanks for pasting your current `LineTagSettings`. You’re close. The main things I’d tweak so it never hard-crashes and lines up with our v1.0 contract:

## What to change (why)

1) **Default system name**  
Your store seeding uses `"Default"` (not `"GENERAL"`). If you ask for `"GENERAL"`, `Peek*` calls can throw or return blanks.  
→ Set `PreviewSystem` default to `"Default"` and fall back to the **first available system** if the chosen one doesn’t exist.

2) **Prefix normalization**  
Some calls may return `"V"` (no hyphen) while the palette/UI expects `"V-"`.  
→ Normalize with a tiny helper so the UI always sees `"V-"`.

3) **Fail-soft store reads**  
Wrap every ProjectStore read so a missing/partial store never tears down the palette.  
→ Try/catch each read; if anything fails, use safe fallbacks and keep the palette alive.

4) **Unbound drawing behavior**  
If the drawing isn’t bound yet, keep previews empty (`—`) and use `"V-"` for prefix. No exceptions.

Below is a **surgical patch** version of your class—keep your attributes/UI layout; just replace the marked parts.

### Drop-in patch for `LineTagSettings` (C# 7.3)

```csharp
using System;
using System.ComponentModel;
using System.IO;
using AutoCAD2020.ProjectStore;
using AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore;
using Newtonsoft.Json;

namespace AutoCAD2020.PropertiesHub
{
    public class LineTagSettings
    {
        // ---------- Appearance ----------
        [Category("Appearance")]
        [Description("Height of annotation text in drawing units.")]
        public double TextHeight { get; set; } = 0.125;

        [Category("Appearance")]
        [Description("Layer to place tag entities on.")]
        public string Layer { get; set; } = "C-ANNO-TAG";

        // ---------- Behavior ----------
        [Category("Behavior")]
        [Description("If true, increments the counter when using the Line Tagging tool.")]
        public bool AutoIncrement { get; set; } = true;

        // ---------- Project Configuration ----------
        [Category("Project Configuration")]
        [DisplayName("Preview System")]
        [Description("System used for previewing the next line/valve numbers.")]
        public string PreviewSystem { get; set; } = "Default"; // CHANGED from "GENERAL"

        [Category("Project Configuration")]
        [DisplayName("Global Valve Prefix")]
        [Description("Default valve-tag prefix stored in Project_Store.json (Tagging.GlobalValvePrefix or Systems[*].Prefix).")]
        public string GlobalValvePrefix { get; set; } = "V"; // keep raw here; UI will see normalized "V-"

        [Category("Project Configuration")]
        [DisplayName("Grace Days")]
        [Description("Days a released tag remains reserved before eligible for reuse.")]
        public int GraceDays { get; set; } = 7;

        [Category("Project Configuration")]
        [DisplayName("Prefer Released Lowest First")]
        [Description("If true, allocator prefers the lowest available released tag first.")]
        public bool PreferReleasedLowestFirst { get; set; } = true;

        // ---------- Compatibility: mirror used by older UI hooks ----------
        [Browsable(false)]
        public string Prefix { get; set; } = "V";

        // ---------- (Optional) Read-only numbers snapshot (if shown elsewhere) ----------
        [Browsable(false)]
        public TagNumbersView TagNumbers { get; private set; } = new TagNumbersView();

        // ---------- Tags (expandable preview group) ----------
        [Category("Tags")]
        [DisplayName("Tags")]
        [Description("Preview of next available tag numbers from the Project Store.")]
        [TypeConverter(typeof(ExpandableObjectConverter))]
        public TagsPreview Tags { get; private set; } = new TagsPreview();

        public sealed class TagsPreview
        {
            [DisplayName("Next Line")]
            [ReadOnly(true)]
            public string NextLine { get; internal set; } = "—";

            [DisplayName("Next Valve")]
            [ReadOnly(true)]
            public string NextValve { get; internal set; } = "—";

            public override string ToString() => "(preview)";
        }

        // ---------- Store sync ----------
        /// <summary>Reads config + TagNumbers and updates the Tags preview. Fail-soft.</summary>
        public void RefreshFromStore()
        {
            try
            {
                var bound = TryResolveStorePath(out var storePath);
                if (!bound) { ApplySafeUnboundDefaults(); return; }

                // config (each call fail-soft)
                GlobalValvePrefix = Safe(() => ProjectStoreService.ReadGlobalValvePrefix(storePath), "V");
                GraceDays = Safe(() => ProjectStoreService.ReadGraceDays(storePath), 7);
                PreferReleasedLowestFirst = Safe(() => ProjectStoreService.ReadPreferReleasedLowestFirst(storePath), true);

                // mirror for legacy UI
                Prefix = GlobalValvePrefix;

                // system list snapshot
                var list = Safe(() => ProjectStoreService.GetSystemNextList(storePath), (SystemNextItem[])null);
                TagNumbers = TagNumbersView.FromList(list);

                // preview next numbers
                RefreshTagsPreviewFromStore();
            }
            catch
            {
                ApplySafeUnboundDefaults();
            }
        }

        /// <summary>Loads only the project config; mirrors Prefix. Fail-soft.</summary>
        public void LoadProjectConfig()
        {
            try
            {
                var bound = TryResolveStorePath(out var storePath);
                if (!bound) { ApplySafeUnboundDefaults(); return; }

                GlobalValvePrefix = Safe(() => ProjectStoreService.ReadGlobalValvePrefix(storePath), "V");
                GraceDays = Safe(() => ProjectStoreService.ReadGraceDays(storePath), 7);
                PreferReleasedLowestFirst = Safe(() => ProjectStoreService.ReadPreferReleasedLowestFirst(storePath), true);

                Prefix = GlobalValvePrefix;
            }
            catch
            {
                ApplySafeUnboundDefaults();
            }
        }

        /// <summary>Writes project config back; mirrors Prefix. Fail-soft.</summary>
        public void SaveProjectConfig()
        {
            var doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            if (doc == null) return;

            if (!ProjectBindingService.TryGetBoundProject(doc, out var binding) ||
                string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(binding.StorePath))
                return;

            try
            {
                ProjectStoreService.WriteGlobalValvePrefix(binding.StorePath, GlobalValvePrefix);
                ProjectStoreService.WriteGraceDays(binding.StorePath, GraceDays);
                ProjectStoreService.WritePreferReleasedLowestFirst(binding.StorePath, PreferReleasedLowestFirst);

                Prefix = GlobalValvePrefix;
            }
            catch
            {
                // swallow in alpha; UI keeps going
            }
        }

        /// <summary>Refresh only the TagNumbers snapshot. Fail-soft.</summary>
        public void RefreshTagNumbersFromStore()
        {
            try
            {
                var bound = TryResolveStorePath(out var storePath);
                if (!bound) { TagNumbers = new TagNumbersView(); return; }

                var list = Safe(() => ProjectStoreService.GetSystemNextList(storePath), (SystemNextItem[])null);
                TagNumbers = TagNumbersView.FromList(list);
            }
            catch
            {
                TagNumbers = new TagNumbersView();
            }
        }

        /// <summary>Hydrates the expandable Tags preview (Next Line / Next Valve). Fail-soft.</summary>
        private void RefreshTagsPreviewFromStore()
        {
            try
            {
                var bound = TryResolveStorePath(out var storePath);
                if (!bound) { Tags = new TagsPreview(); return; }

                // Resolve a valid system: prefer PreviewSystem; else first available
                var sys = ResolvePreviewSystem(storePath, PreviewSystem);

                var line = Safe(() => ProjectStoreService.PeekLineTagString(storePath, sys), "—");
                var valve = Safe(() => ProjectStoreService.PeekValveTagString(storePath, sys), "—");

                Tags = new TagsPreview { NextLine = line, NextValve = valve };
            }
            catch
            {
                Tags = new TagsPreview();
            }
        }

        // ---------- helpers (private) ----------

        private static T Safe<T>(Func<T> read, T fallback)
        {
            try { return read(); } catch { return fallback; }
        }

        private static string NormalizeUiPrefix(string raw)
        {
            var p = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(raw) ? "V" : raw.Trim();
            return p.EndsWith("-") ? p : (p + "-");
        }

        private static bool TryResolveStorePath(out string storePath)
        {
            storePath = null;
            var doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            if (doc == null) return false;

            if (!ProjectBindingService.TryGetBoundProject(doc, out var binding) ||
                string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(binding.StorePath))
                return false;

            storePath = binding.StorePath;
            return true;
        }

        private void ApplySafeUnboundDefaults()
        {
            GlobalValvePrefix = "V";
            Prefix = GlobalValvePrefix;
            TagNumbers = new TagNumbersView();
            Tags = new TagsPreview();
        }

        /// <summary>Returns a valid system name. Prefers requested; else first available; else "Default".</summary>
        private static string ResolvePreviewSystem(string storePath, string requested)
        {
            // preferred
            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(requested))
            {
                var ok = Safe(() => ProjectStoreService.SystemExists(storePath, requested), false);
                if (ok) return requested;
            }

            // first available
            var first = Safe(() => ProjectStoreService.GetFirstSystemName(storePath), (string)null);
            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(first)) return first;

            // final fallback aligned to our seeding
            return "Default";
        }

        // Expose a UI-normalized prefix if you bind it to labels:
        [Browsable(false)]
        public string UiValvePrefix => NormalizeUiPrefix(GlobalValvePrefix);
    }

    public static class MasterProperties
    {
        private const string FileName = "LineTagSettings.json";
        private static LineTagSettings _lineTag;

        public static LineTagSettings LineTag
            => _lineTag ?? (_lineTag = Load() ?? new LineTagSettings());

        public static void Save()
        {
            var json = JsonConvert.SerializeObject(LineTag, Formatting.Indented);
            File.WriteAllText(FileName, json);
        }

        private static LineTagSettings Load()
        {
            if (!File.Exists(FileName)) return null;
            var json = File.ReadAllText(FileName);
            return JsonConvert.DeserializeObject<LineTagSettings>(json);
        }
    }
}
```

{
    try {
        var s = Load(path);
        if (s.Systems == null || s.Systems.Count == 0) return null;
        foreach (var k in s.Systems.Keys) return k; // first
        return null;
    } catch { return null; }
}

> Assumptions (aligned to your v1.0 contract):

> - “Global Valve Prefix” = the **system prefix** (UI shows `V-` by normalizing).

## File: `AutoCAD_Shared_Project\ProjectStore\ProjectStoreService.cs` (replace)

```csharp
// C# 7.3
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.IO;
using Newtonsoft.Json;

namespace AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore
{
    /// <summary>
    /// v1.0 store reader/writer with *auto-seeding* + *safe helpers* so callers never crash on partial stores.
    /// </summary>
    public static class ProjectStoreService
    {
        // ---------- Core load/save (with seeding + validation) ----------

        public static ProjectStoreV1 Load(string path)
        {
            var store = ReadJson<ProjectStoreV1>(path);

            // Seed any missing required sections so validation won’t bomb.
            store = ProjectStoreDefaults.SeedIfMissing(store);

            // Validate against canonical v1.0 rules.
            ProjectStoreValidator.ValidateOrThrow(store);

            return store;
        }

        public static void Save(string path, ProjectStoreV1 store)
        {
            // Ensure seeded & valid before writing
            store = ProjectStoreDefaults.SeedIfMissing(store);
            ProjectStoreValidator.ValidateOrThrow(store);
            AtomicWrite(path, store);
        }

        // ---------- Config reads (fail-soft wrappers live in UI classes) ----------

        /// <summary>Returns the *raw* valve prefix for UI (e.g., "V"). Callers can add a "-" for display.</summary>
        public static string ReadGlobalValvePrefix(string path)
        {
            var s = Load(path);
            var sysName = GetFirstSystemNameFromStore(s) ?? "Default";
            var sys = GetSystemOrNull(s, sysName);
            return (sys != null && !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(sys.Prefix)) ? sys.Prefix : "V";
        }

        public static int ReadGraceDays(string path)
        {
            var s = Load(path);
            // If you later add this into Config, map it here. For alpha: default 7.
            return 7;
        }

        public static bool ReadPreferReleasedLowestFirst(string path)
        {
            var s = Load(path);
            // If you later add this into Config, map it here. For alpha: default true.
            return true;
        }

        public static void WriteGlobalValvePrefix(string path, string prefix)
        {
            var s = Load(path);
            var sysName = GetFirstSystemNameFromStore(s) ?? "Default";
            EnsureSystemExists(s, sysName);

            s.Systems[sysName].Prefix = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(prefix) ? "V" : prefix.Trim();
            Save(path, s);
        }

        public static void WriteGraceDays(string path, int days)
        {
            var s = Load(path);
            // Add to Config when you formalize it; for now we just persist by convention if needed.
            Save(path, s);
        }

        public static void WritePreferReleasedLowestFirst(string path, bool preferLowest)
        {
            var s = Load(path);
            // Add to Config when you formalize it; for now we just persist by convention if needed.
            Save(path, s);
        }

        // ---------- Systems & preview helpers (used by palette) ----------

        public static bool SystemExists(string path, string name)
        {
            var s = Load(path);
            return s.Systems != null && s.Systems.ContainsKey(name);
        }

        /// <summary>Returns the first system name (map order), or null if none.</summary>
        public static string GetFirstSystemName(string path)
        {
            var s = Load(path);
            return GetFirstSystemNameFromStore(s);
        }

        /// <summary>Returns preview rows for a simple “next counters” list.</summary>
        public static SystemNextItem[] GetSystemNextList(string path)
        {
            var s = Load(path);
            var list = new List<SystemNextItem>();

            if (s.Systems != null)
            {
                foreach (var kv in s.Systems)
                {
                    var name = kv.Key;
                    var sys = kv.Value ?? new TagSystem();
                    var prefix = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(sys.Prefix) ? "V" : sys.Prefix.Trim();
                    var pad = sys.Pad > 0 ? sys.Pad : 3;
                    var next = Clamp(sys.Next, sys.Start, sys.End);

                    var tag = $"{prefix}-{next.ToString().PadLeft(pad, '0')}";
                    list.Add(new SystemNextItem { System = name, Next = next, NextTag = tag });
                }
            }

            return list.ToArray();
        }

        /// <summary>Preview next Line tag string for a given system (no mutation).</summary>
        public static string PeekLineTagString(string path, string systemName)
        {
            var s = Load(path);
            var sys = GetSystemOrFirst(s, systemName);
            return FormatTag(sys);
        }

        /// <summary>Preview next Valve tag string for a given system (no mutation).</summary>
        public static string PeekValveTagString(string path, string systemName)
        {
            var s = Load(path);
            var sys = GetSystemOrFirst(s, systemName);
            // In alpha, use the same counter for a unified preview.
            return FormatTag(sys);
        }

        // ---------- Internals ----------

        private static string FormatTag(TagSystem sys)
        {
            if (sys == null) return "V-000";
            var prefix = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(sys.Prefix) ? "V" : sys.Prefix.Trim();
            var pad = sys.Pad > 0 ? sys.Pad : 3;
            var next = Clamp(sys.Next, sys.Start, sys.End);
            return $"{prefix}-{next.ToString().PadLeft(pad, '0')}";
        }

        private static int Clamp(int next, int start, int end)
        {
            if (start <= 0) start = 1;
            if (end < start) end = start;
            if (next < start) next = start;
            if (next > end) next = end;
            return next;
        }

        private static TagSystem GetSystemOrFirst(ProjectStoreV1 s, string name)
        {
            if (s?.Systems == null || s.Systems.Count == 0) return null;

            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(name) && s.Systems.ContainsKey(name))
                return s.Systems[name];

            foreach (var kv in s.Systems) return kv.Value; // first
            return null;
        }

        private static string GetFirstSystemNameFromStore(ProjectStoreV1 s)
        {
            if (s?.Systems == null || s.Systems.Count == 0) return null;
            foreach (var kv in s.Systems) return kv.Key; // first
            return null;
        }

        private static TagSystem GetSystemOrNull(ProjectStoreV1 s, string name)
        {
            if (s?.Systems == null) return null;
            TagSystem sys;
            return s.Systems.TryGetValue(name, out sys) ? sys : null;
        }

        private static void EnsureSystemExists(ProjectStoreV1 s, string name)
        {
            if (s.Systems == null)
                s.Systems = ProjectStoreDefaults.CreateDefaultSystems();

            if (!s.Systems.ContainsKey(name))
                s.Systems[name] = new TagSystem { Prefix = "V", Pad = 3, Start = 1, End = 999, Next = 1 };
        }

        // ---------- JSON I/O (atomic) ----------

        private static T ReadJson<T>(string path)
        {
            if (!File.Exists(path)) return default(T);
            var json = File.ReadAllText(path);
            return JsonConvert.DeserializeObject<T>(json);
        }

        private static void AtomicWrite<T>(string path, T data)
        {
            var dir = Path.GetDirectoryName(path);
            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(dir) && !Directory.Exists(dir))
                Directory.CreateDirectory(dir);

            var tmp = path + ".tmp";
            var json = JsonConvert.SerializeObject(data, Formatting.Indented);
            File.WriteAllText(tmp, json);

            if (File.Exists(path))
                File.Replace(tmp, path, null);
            else
                File.Move(tmp, path);
        }
    }

    // ---------- lightweight DTO used by palette list ----------
    public sealed class SystemNextItem
    {
        public string System { get; set; }
        public int Next { get; set; }
        public string NextTag { get; set; }
    }
}
```

---

### How this stabilizes you

- **Seed before validate** → legacy/partial stores won’t throw (“No Systems defined” is gone).
- **Safe reads** → `ReadGlobalValvePrefix`, `Peek*`, etc., won’t crash even if JSON was hand-edited.
- **Predictable previews** → tags always render like `V-001` using `Prefix/Pad/Next`.
- **Atomic writes** → store updates can’t corrupt `Project_Store.json` if AutoCAD crashes.

---

### Quick test

1) Open the drawing that previously crashed.  
2) Run `CBI_RepairProjectStore` (from my prior message, if you added it).  
3) Open the **CBI Properties** palette → should load cleanly; `UiValvePrefix` shows `V-`.  
4) In the palette, **Preview System** = `Default` works; switching to an unknown name still previews (falls back to first system).

If your validator currently expects additional fields (e.g., `Blocks.Valve.Types`), keep the `ProjectStoreDefaults` we added earlier — that’s what guarantees those are present too. If you want, send me your current `ProjectStoreValidator.ValidateOrThrow(...)` and I’ll align its checks precisely to these seed rules so they’re 1:1.

public static void ValidateOrThrow(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s)
{
    if (s == null) throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(s));
    if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(s.Version)) throw new InvalidOperationException("Version missing.");
    if (s.Config == null) s.Config = new V1.StoreConfigV1();
    if (s.Systems == null || s.Systems.Count == 0)
        throw new InvalidOperationException("No Systems defined.");
    foreach (var kv in s.Systems)
    {
        var c = kv.Value ?? new V1.SystemCounterV1();
        if (c.End < c.Start) throw new InvalidOperationException($"System '{kv.Key}' has End < Start.");
    }
    // ensure lists
    s.Tags = s.Tags ?? new System.Collections.Generic.List<V1.TagRecordV1>();
    s.Released = s.Released ?? new System.Collections.Generic.List<V1.TagReleaseRecordV1>();
    s.History = s.History ?? new System.Collections.Generic.List<V1.HistoryEntryV1>();
}

public static bool Validate(V1.ProjectStoreV1 store)
{
    ValidateOrThrow(store);
    return true;
}

> **Adjusting validator behavior**
>
> I should suggest adjusting the validator to align with seeding to avoid crashes, possibly opting for non-throwing behavior or soft validation. The current `ValidateOrThrow` throws when systems are missing, but with seeding, systems should be created. I could add protective checks or modify it to auto-correct missing configurations to prevent errors. A pre-pass to "sanitize" might also keep things safe.
>
> Thought for 20s

Perfect—thanks for sharing your current validator. It’s **strict** (throws on “No Systems defined.”), which is what tripped your palette. Since we’re in **alpha** and want **fail-soft + self-repair**, here’s a drop-in that keeps your V1 type names, **sanitizes in place**, then validates. It only throws on truly fatal conditions.

## ✅ What this does
- **Sanitizes first** (fills `Version`, `Config`, `Systems` (adds a `Default`), clamps counters, ensures lists).  
- **Validates after** (ensures at least one system, and `End >= Start`).  
- Keeps your public surface (`ValidateOrThrow`, `Validate`) intact.  
- C# 7.3 compatible.

> Tip: With this, you can keep `ProjectStoreService.Load()` calling `SeedIfMissing(...)` and still be safe; duplication is harmless, but you can remove the seed call later if you prefer this to be the single source of truth.

---

### 🔁 Replacement: `ProjectStoreValidator` (V1)

```csharp
using System;

namespace AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore
{
    public static class ProjectStoreValidator
    {
        // Entry point used by callers that expect exceptions on fatal issues.
        public static void ValidateOrThrow(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s)
        {
            if (s == null) throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(s));

            // 1) Repair/sanitize in place (alpha-friendly)
            SanitizeInPlace(s);

            // 2) Strict checks that must hold after sanitize
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(s.Version))
                throw new InvalidOperationException("Version missing after sanitize.");

            if (s.Systems == null || s.Systems.Count == 0)
                throw new InvalidOperationException("No Systems defined after sanitize.");

            foreach (var kv in s.Systems)
            {
                var name = kv.Key ?? "(unnamed)";
                var c = kv.Value ?? new V1.SystemCounterV1();

                if (c.End < c.Start)
                    throw new InvalidOperationException($"System '{name}' has End < Start.");

                // Optional: require a positive pad
                if (c.Pad <= 0)
                    throw new InvalidOperationException($"System '{name}' has invalid Pad (<=0).");
            }

            // Lists already ensured in sanitize
        }

        // Convenience wrapper; keeps your existing signature/behavior.
        public static bool Validate(V1.ProjectStoreV1 store)
        {
            ValidateOrThrow(store);
            return true;
        }

        // ----------------- Helpers -----------------

        /// <summary>
        /// Alpha-friendly: fixes common null/missing/misaligned values in place so callers don’t crash.
        /// </summary>
        private static void SanitizeInPlace(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s)
        {
            // Version
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(s.Version))
                s.Version = "1.0";

            // Config
            if (s.Config == null)
                s.Config = new V1.StoreConfigV1();

            // Systems
            if (s.Systems == null || s.Systems.Count == 0)
            {
                // Seed a minimal default system so tools can run
                s.Systems = new System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary<string, V1.SystemCounterV1>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
                {
                    ["Default"] = new V1.SystemCounterV1
                    {
                        Prefix = "V",
                        Pad    = 3,
                        Start  = 1,
                        End    = 999,
                        Next   = 1
                    }
                };
            }

            // Clamp & normalize each system counter
            foreach (var kv in s.Systems)
            {
                var c = kv.Value ?? (kv.Value = new V1.SystemCounterV1());

                if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(c.Prefix))
                    c.Prefix = "V";

                if (c.Pad <= 0) c.Pad = 3;

                if (c.Start <= 0) c.Start = 1;
                if (c.End < c.Start) c.End = c.Start;

                if (c.Next < c.Start) c.Next = c.Start;
                if (c.Next > c.End) c.Next = c.End;
            }

            // Lists (ensure non-null so callers can add)
            if (s.Tags == null)     s.Tags     = new System.Collections.Generic.List<V1.TagRecordV1>();
            if (s.Released == null) s.Released = new System.Collections.Generic.List<V1.TagReleaseRecordV1>();
            if (s.History == null)  s.History  = new System.Collections.Generic.List<V1.HistoryEntryV1>();

            // If your v1 contract also requires Blocks.Valve.Types, enforce here (optional):
            // EnsureBlocksValveTypes(s);
        }

        // If you want to enforce block mappings as part of v1 contract, uncomment and call above.
        /*
        private static void EnsureBlocksValveTypes(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s)
        {
            if (s.Blocks == null) s.Blocks = new V1.BlocksV1();
            if (s.Blocks.Valve == null) s.Blocks.Valve = new V1.ValveBlocksV1();
            if (s.Blocks.Valve.Types == null || s.Blocks.Valve.Types.Count == 0)
            {
                s.Blocks.Valve.Types = new System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary<string, string>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
                {
                    { "Ball",      @"C:\CBICAD\AutoCAD\Blocks\Instrumentation\INST_BALL-VALVE.dwg" },
                    { "Butterfly", @"C:\CBICAD\AutoCAD\Blocks\Instrumentation\INST_BFLY-VALVE.dwg" }
                    // { "Check",  @"C:\CBICAD\AutoCAD\Blocks\Instrumentation\INST_CHECK-VALVE.dwg" },
                };
            }
        }
        */
    }
}
```

## How to use it (quick)
- Keep `ProjectStoreService.Load(path)` as-is, or simplify to just `Read → ValidateOrThrow` (since this validator now sanitizes internally).
- Re-open the crashing DWG; run `CBI_RepairProjectStore` once (optional; good hygiene).
- Open **CBI Properties** → no crash; previews work.

// ============================================================================
// File      : AutoCAD_Shared_Project/ProjectStore/ProjectStoreV1.cs
// Purpose   : v1 data model for the Project Store (JSON) used by CBI tools.
// Target    : C# 7.3 / .NET Framework compatible
// Notes     : Pure POCOs. No helper logic here — TagStoreV1/StoreGuards live in
//             namespace AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore (parent, no ".V1").
// ============================================================================

using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;

namespace AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.V1
{
    public sealed class ProjectInfoV1
    {
        public string Name { get; set; } = "";
    }

    // ------------------------------- Config ----------------------------------
    public sealed class StoreConfigV1
    {
        public string GlobalValvePrefix { get; set; } = "V";
        public int GraceDays { get; set; } = 7;     // days before auto-release allowed
        public bool PreferReleasedLowestFirst { get; set; } = true;  // reuse smallest number first
    }

    // ------------------------------- Counters --------------------------------
    public sealed class SystemCounterV1
    {
        // Example: Prefix="INST", Pad=4 -> INST-0001
        public string Prefix { get; set; } = "INST";
        public int Pad { get; set; } = 4;
        public int Start { get; set; } = 1;
        public int End { get; set; } = 9999;
        public int Next { get; set; } = 1;   // next number to allocate
    }

    // ------------------------------- Status ----------------------------------
    public enum TagStatusV1
    {
        Active = 0,
        Orphan = 1,
        Released = 2,
        Reserved = 3,  // keep for future use / UI filters
        Superseded = 4
    }

    // ------------------------------- History ---------------------------------
    public sealed class TagHistoryV1
    {
        public DateTime Utc { get; set; } = DateTime.UtcNow;
        public string Action { get; set; } = "";   // Allocated, Released, Reassigned, MarkedOrphan, etc.
        public string By { get; set; } = "";
        public string Details { get; set; } = "";
    }

    public sealed class HistoryEntryV1
    {
        public DateTime Utc { get; set; } = DateTime.UtcNow;
        public string Action { get; set; } = "";   // Allocate, AllocateFromReleased, Released, etc.
        public string By { get; set; } = "";
        public string Details { get; set; } = "";
    }

    // ------------------------------- Records ---------------------------------
    public sealed class TagRecordV1
    {
        // Identity
        public string Id { get; set; } = "";        // e.g., "INST-0021"
        public string System { get; set; } = "GENERAL"; // system key used to allocate

        // Placement (lightweight)
        public string Drawing { get; set; } = "";        // file path or name
        public string EntityHandle { get; set; } = "";        // owner block handle (hex)

        // Lifecycle
        public TagStatusV1 Status { get; set; } = TagStatusV1.Active;
        public DateTime CreatedUtc { get; set; } = DateTime.UtcNow;
        public DateTime? OrphanedAtUtc { get; set; } = null;

        // Audit
        public string By { get; set; } = "";
        public string Notes { get; set; } = "";

        // Per-tag history
        public List<TagHistoryV1> History { get; set; } = new List<TagHistoryV1>();
    }

    public sealed class TagReleaseRecordV1
    {
        public string Id { get; set; } = "";        // released tag ID
        public string Reason { get; set; } = "";
        public string By { get; set; } = "";
        public DateTime Utc { get; set; } = DateTime.UtcNow;
    }

    // ------------------------------- Root Store -------------------------------
    public sealed class ProjectStoreV1
    {
        public string Version { get; set; } = "1.0";
        public ProjectInfoV1 Project { get; set; } = new ProjectInfoV1();

        public StoreConfigV1 Config { get; set; } = new StoreConfigV1();

        // System counters (keys are system names; use case-insensitive dictionary when constructing)
        //public Dictionary<string, SystemCounterV1> Systems { get; set; }
        //    = new Dictionary<string, SystemCounterV1>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

        public System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary<string, SystemCounterV1> Systems { get; set; }
            = new System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary<string, SystemCounterV1>(System.StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

        // Active tags
        //public List<TagRecordV1> Tags { get; set; } = new List<TagRecordV1>();
        public System.Collections.Generic.List<TagRecordV1> Tags { get; set; }
            = new System.Collections.Generic.List<TagRecordV1>();

        // Pool of released IDs (eligible for reuse)
        //public List<TagReleaseRecordV1> Released { get; set; } = new List<TagReleaseRecordV1>();
        public System.Collections.Generic.List<TagReleaseRecordV1> Released { get; set; }
           = new System.Collections.Generic.List<TagReleaseRecordV1>();

        // Global history for store-level actions
        //public List<HistoryEntryV1> History { get; set; } = new List<HistoryEntryV1>();
        public System.Collections.Generic.List<HistoryEntryV1> History { get; set; }
            = new System.Collections.Generic.List<HistoryEntryV1>();
    }
}

Got it—thanks for the model. Since your **V1 store has no `Blocks` section**, I’ve aligned everything to your current `ProjectStoreV1` + `SystemCounterV1`. Below are **drop-in files** with your requested headers and C# 7.3 compatibility. They:

- Seed a **Default** system when missing (prefix taken from `Config.GlobalValvePrefix` if set, else `"V"`).
- Prefer `Config.GlobalValvePrefix` for UI prefix reads, with safe fallbacks.
- Fail-soft on reads; validate only after a sanitize pass.
- Include small helpers used by the palette (`SystemExists`, `GetFirstSystemName`, `Peek*`, etc.).
- Use **atomic JSON writes**.

---

### `AutoCAD_Shared_Project/ProjectStore/ProjectStoreDefaults.cs`

```csharp
// ============================================================================
// File      : AutoCAD_Shared_Project/ProjectStore/ProjectStoreDefaults.cs
// Purpose   : Alpha-friendly seeding utilities for ProjectStore V1 (JSON).
// Target    : C# 7.3 / .NET Framework compatible
// Notes     : No Blocks section here (aligned to your current V1 model).
//             Ensures Version, Config, Systems (with "Default") and lists.
// ============================================================================

using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.V1;

namespace AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore
{
    public static class ProjectStoreDefaults
    {
        /// <summary>Seed any missing required sections; never returns null.</summary>
        public static ProjectStoreV1 SeedIfMissing(ProjectStoreV1 s)
        {
            if (s == null) s = new ProjectStoreV1();

            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(s.Version))
                s.Version = "1.0";

            if (s.Config == null)
                s.Config = new StoreConfigV1();

            if (s.Systems == null || s.Systems.Count == 0)
                s.Systems = CreateDefaultSystems(s.Config);

            if (s.Tags == null)     s.Tags     = new List<TagRecordV1>();
            if (s.Released == null) s.Released = new List<TagReleaseRecordV1>();
            if (s.History == null)  s.History  = new List<HistoryEntryV1>();

            // Clamp/normalize counters
            foreach (var kv in s.Systems)
            {
                var c = kv.Value ?? (kv.Value = new SystemCounterV1());
                if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(c.Prefix))
                    c.Prefix = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(s.Config.GlobalValvePrefix) ? "V" : s.Config.GlobalValvePrefix.Trim();

                if (c.Pad <= 0) c.Pad = 3;
                if (c.Start <= 0) c.Start = 1;
                if (c.End < c.Start) c.End = c.Start;
                if (c.Next < c.Start) c.Next = c.Start;
                if (c.Next > c.End) c.Next = c.End;
            }

            return s;
        }

        public static ProjectStoreV1 CreateFresh()
        {
            var s = new ProjectStoreV1
            {
                Version = "1.0",
                Config = new StoreConfigV1 { GlobalValvePrefix = "V", GraceDays = 7, PreferReleasedLowestFirst = true },
                Project = new ProjectInfoV1()
            };
            s.Systems = CreateDefaultSystems(s.Config);
            return s;
        }

        private static Dictionary<string, SystemCounterV1> CreateDefaultSystems(StoreConfigV1 cfg)
        {
            var prefix = (cfg != null && !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(cfg.GlobalValvePrefix))
                ? cfg.GlobalValvePrefix.Trim()
                : "V";

            return new Dictionary<string, SystemCounterV1>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
            {
                ["Default"] = new SystemCounterV1
                {
                    Prefix = prefix,
                    Pad    = 3,
                    Start  = 1,
                    End    = 999,
                    Next   = 1
                }
            };
        }
    }
}
```

---

### `AutoCAD_Shared_Project/ProjectStore/ProjectStoreService.cs`

```csharp
// ============================================================================
// File      : AutoCAD_Shared_Project/ProjectStore/ProjectStoreService.cs
// Purpose   : v1 store reader/writer with sanitize+validate and safe helpers.
// Target    : C# 7.3 / .NET Framework compatible
// Notes     : Prefers Config.GlobalValvePrefix; no Blocks section required.
// ============================================================================

using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.IO;
using Newtonsoft.Json;
using AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.V1;

namespace AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore
{
    public static class ProjectStoreService
    {
        // ---------- Core load/save ----------

        public static ProjectStoreV1 Load(string path)
        {
            var store = ReadJson<ProjectStoreV1>(path);

            // Seed before validate so legacy/partial files don't bomb
            store = ProjectStoreDefaults.SeedIfMissing(store);

            // Validate (throws only on truly fatal issues)
            ProjectStoreValidator.ValidateOrThrow(store);

            return store;
        }

        public static void Save(string path, ProjectStoreV1 store)
        {
            store = ProjectStoreDefaults.SeedIfMissing(store);
            ProjectStoreValidator.ValidateOrThrow(store);
            AtomicWrite(path, store);
        }

        // ---------- Config reads/writes ----------

        /// <summary>Returns raw prefix (e.g. "V"). UI can append "-".</summary>
        public static string ReadGlobalValvePrefix(string path)
        {
            var s = Load(path);

            // Prefer Config.GlobalValvePrefix if present
            var cfgPrefix = s.Config != null ? s.Config.GlobalValvePrefix : null;
            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(cfgPrefix))
                return cfgPrefix.Trim();

            // Fallback to first system prefix
            var first = GetFirstSystemNameFromStore(s) ?? "Default";
            var sys = GetSystemOrNull(s, first);
            return (sys != null && !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(sys.Prefix)) ? sys.Prefix.Trim() : "V";
        }

        public static int ReadGraceDays(string path)
        {
            var s = Load(path);
            return (s.Config != null && s.Config.GraceDays > 0) ? s.Config.GraceDays : 7;
        }

        public static bool ReadPreferReleasedLowestFirst(string path)
        {
            var s = Load(path);
            return (s.Config != null) ? s.Config.PreferReleasedLowestFirst : true;
        }

        public static void WriteGlobalValvePrefix(string path, string prefix)
        {
            var s = Load(path);
            if (s.Config == null) s.Config = new StoreConfigV1();
            s.Config.GlobalValvePrefix = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(prefix) ? "V" : prefix.Trim();

            // Keep first/default system aligned for preview friendliness
            var first = GetFirstSystemNameFromStore(s) ?? "Default";
            EnsureSystemExists(s, first);
            s.Systems[first].Prefix = s.Config.GlobalValvePrefix;

            Save(path, s);
        }

        public static void WriteGraceDays(string path, int days)
        {
            var s = Load(path);
            if (s.Config == null) s.Config = new StoreConfigV1();
            s.Config.GraceDays = days > 0 ? days : 7;
            Save(path, s);
        }

        public static void WritePreferReleasedLowestFirst(string path, bool preferLowest)
        {
            var s = Load(path);
            if (s.Config == null) s.Config = new StoreConfigV1();
            s.Config.PreferReleasedLowestFirst = preferLowest;
            Save(path, s);
        }

        // ---------- Systems & preview helpers (palette) ----------

        public static bool SystemExists(string path, string name)
        {
            var s = Load(path);
            return s.Systems != null && s.Systems.ContainsKey(name);
        }

        public static string GetFirstSystemName(string path)
        {
            var s = Load(path);
            return GetFirstSystemNameFromStore(s);
        }

        public static SystemNextItem[] GetSystemNextList(string path)
        {
            var s = Load(path);
            var list = new List<SystemNextItem>();

            if (s.Systems != null)
            {
                foreach (var kv in s.Systems)
                {
                    var name = kv.Key;
                    var sys = kv.Value ?? new SystemCounterV1();
                    var prefix = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(sys.Prefix) ? "V" : sys.Prefix.Trim();
                    var pad = sys.Pad > 0 ? sys.Pad : 3;
                    var next = Clamp(sys.Next, sys.Start, sys.End);
                    var tag = prefix + "-" + next.ToString().PadLeft(pad, '0');

                    list.Add(new SystemNextItem { System = name, Next = next, NextTag = tag });
                }
            }

            return list.ToArray();
        }

        public static string PeekLineTagString(string path, string systemName)
        {
            var s = Load(path);
            var sys = GetSystemOrFirst(s, systemName);
            return FormatTag(sys);
        }

        public static string PeekValveTagString(string path, string systemName)
        {
            var s = Load(path);
            var sys = GetSystemOrFirst(s, systemName);
            return FormatTag(sys);
        }

        // ---------- Internals ----------

        private static string FormatTag(SystemCounterV1 sys)
        {
            if (sys == null) return "V-000";
            var prefix = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(sys.Prefix) ? "V" : sys.Prefix.Trim();
            var pad = sys.Pad > 0 ? sys.Pad : 3;
            var next = Clamp(sys.Next, sys.Start, sys.End);
            return prefix + "-" + next.ToString().PadLeft(pad, '0');
        }

        private static int Clamp(int next, int start, int end)
        {
            if (start <= 0) start = 1;
            if (end < start) end = start;
            if (next < start) next = start;
            if (next > end) next = end;
            return next;
        }

        private static SystemCounterV1 GetSystemOrFirst(ProjectStoreV1 s, string name)
        {
            if (s?.Systems == null || s.Systems.Count == 0) return null;

            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(name) && s.Systems.ContainsKey(name))
                return s.Systems[name];

            foreach (var kv in s.Systems) return kv.Value; // first
            return null;
        }

        private static string GetFirstSystemNameFromStore(ProjectStoreV1 s)
        {
            if (s?.Systems == null || s.Systems.Count == 0) return null;
            foreach (var kv in s.Systems) return kv.Key; // first
            return null;
        }

        private static SystemCounterV1 GetSystemOrNull(ProjectStoreV1 s, string name)
        {
            if (s?.Systems == null) return null;
            SystemCounterV1 sys;
            return s.Systems.TryGetValue(name, out sys) ? sys : null;
        }

        private static void EnsureSystemExists(ProjectStoreV1 s, string name)
        {
            if (s.Systems == null)
                s.Systems = new Dictionary<string, SystemCounterV1>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

            if (!s.Systems.ContainsKey(name))
                s.Systems[name] = new SystemCounterV1 { Prefix = "V", Pad = 3, Start = 1, End = 999, Next = 1 };
        }

        // ---------- JSON I/O ----------

        private static T ReadJson<T>(string path)
        {
            if (!File.Exists(path)) return default(T);
            var json = File.ReadAllText(path);
            return JsonConvert.DeserializeObject<T>(json);
        }

        private static void AtomicWrite<T>(string path, T data)
        {
            var dir = Path.GetDirectoryName(path);
            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(dir) && !Directory.Exists(dir))
                Directory.CreateDirectory(dir);

            var tmp = path + ".tmp";
            var json = JsonConvert.SerializeObject(data, Formatting.Indented);
            File.WriteAllText(tmp, json);

            if (File.Exists(path)) File.Replace(tmp, path, null);
            else File.Move(tmp, path);
        }
    }

    // Lightweight DTO for palette list
    public sealed class SystemNextItem
    {
        public string System { get; set; }
        public int Next { get; set; }
        public string NextTag { get; set; }
    }
}
```

---

### `AutoCAD_Shared_Project/ProjectStore/ProjectStoreValidator.cs`

```csharp
// ============================================================================
// File      : AutoCAD_Shared_Project/ProjectStore/ProjectStoreValidator.cs
// Purpose   : Sanitize + validate ProjectStore V1; alpha-friendly fail-soft.
// Target    : C# 7.3 / .NET Framework compatible
// Notes     : No Blocks enforcement (not in your current V1 model).
// ============================================================================

using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.V1;

namespace AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore
{
    public static class ProjectStoreValidator
    {
        public static void ValidateOrThrow(ProjectStoreV1 s)
        {
            if (s == null) throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(s));

            SanitizeInPlace(s);

            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(s.Version))
                throw new InvalidOperationException("Version missing after sanitize.");

            if (s.Systems == null || s.Systems.Count == 0)
                throw new InvalidOperationException("No Systems defined after sanitize.");

            foreach (var kv in s.Systems)
            {
                var name = kv.Key ?? "(unnamed)";
                var c = kv.Value ?? new SystemCounterV1();

                if (c.End < c.Start)
                    throw new InvalidOperationException($"System '{name}' has End < Start.");

                if (c.Pad <= 0)
                    throw new InvalidOperationException($"System '{name}' has invalid Pad (<=0).");
            }
        }

        public static bool Validate(ProjectStoreV1 store)
        {
            ValidateOrThrow(store);
            return true;
        }

        private static void SanitizeInPlace(ProjectStoreV1 s)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(s.Version))
                s.Version = "1.0";

            if (s.Config == null)
                s.Config = new StoreConfigV1();

            if (s.Systems == null || s.Systems.Count == 0)
            {
                s.Systems = new Dictionary<string, SystemCounterV1>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
                {
                    ["Default"] = new SystemCounterV1
                    {
                        Prefix = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(s.Config.GlobalValvePrefix) ? "V" : s.Config.GlobalValvePrefix.Trim(),
                        Pad    = 3,
                        Start  = 1,
                        End    = 999,
                        Next   = 1
                    }
                };
            }

            foreach (var kv in s.Systems)
            {
                var c = kv.Value ?? (kv.Value = new SystemCounterV1());
                if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(c.Prefix))
                    c.Prefix = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(s.Config.GlobalValvePrefix) ? "V" : s.Config.GlobalValvePrefix.Trim();

                if (c.Pad <= 0) c.Pad = 3;
                if (c.Start <= 0) c.Start = 1;
                if (c.End < c.Start) c.End = c.Start;
                if (c.Next < c.Start) c.Next = c.Start;
                if (c.Next > c.End) c.Next = c.End;
            }

            if (s.Tags == null)     s.Tags     = new List<TagRecordV1>();
            if (s.Released == null) s.Released = new List<TagReleaseRecordV1>();
            if (s.History == null)  s.History  = new List<HistoryEntryV1>();
        }
    }
}
```
