# 2) ReconcileCurrentDrawing — fixed path var, SaveAtomic, and TagStoreV1.GetAll
**File:** `AutoCAD2020/Tagging/Services/ReconcileCurrentDrawing.cs`
```csharp
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// File: AutoCAD2020/Tagging/Services/ReconcileCurrentDrawing.cs
// Purpose: Mark any tags in the current DWG whose entities are missing as Orphan.
// Target : C# 7.3
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
using System;
using System.Linq;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.DatabaseServices;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.EditorInput;
using V1 = AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.V1;
using AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore;

namespace AutoCAD2020.Tagging.Services
{
    public static class ReconcileCurrentDrawing
    {
        const string NodKey = "CBI/ProjectStore/Path";

        public static void Run()
        {
            var doc = Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            if (doc == null) return;
            var ed = doc.Editor;

            // Resolve store path from NOD
            var path = TryReadStorePathFromNod(doc.Database);
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(path))
            {
                ed.WriteMessage("\nNo Project Store path bound (NOD key missing).");
                return;
            }

            // Load store file
            var store = ProjectStoreService.Load(path);
            if (store == null)
            {
                ed.WriteMessage("\nUnable to load Project_Store.json.");
                return;
            }

            // Read all handles present in the drawing
            var present = GetAllHandlesInDrawing(doc.Database);

            // Reconcile for this drawing only
            var thisDwgn = doc.Name ?? "";
            var count = 0;

            foreach (var rec in TagStoreV1.GetAll(store))
            {
                if (!string.Equals(rec.Drawing ?? "", thisDwgn, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
                    continue;

                var h = (rec.EntityHandle ?? "").Trim();
                if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(h) || !present.Contains(h))
                {
                    if (rec.Status != V1.TagStatusV1.Orphan)
                    {
                        TagStoreV1.MarkOrphan(store, rec.Id, Environment.UserName, "Missing in DWG");
                        count++;
                    }
                }
            }

            // Save back (use Save, not SaveAtomic)
            ProjectStoreService.Save(path, store);
            ed.WriteMessage($"\nReconcile complete. Marked Orphan: {count}");
        }

        private static HashSet<string> GetAllHandlesInDrawing(Database db)
        {
            var set = new HashSet<string>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
            using (var tr = db.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
            {
                var bt = (BlockTable)tr.GetObject(db.BlockTableId, OpenMode.ForRead);
                foreach (ObjectId btrId in bt)
                {
                    var btr = (BlockTableRecord)tr.GetObject(btrId, OpenMode.ForRead);
                    foreach (ObjectId id in btr)
                    {
                        var dbo = tr.GetObject(id, OpenMode.ForRead, false);
                        if (dbo != null) set.Add(dbo.Handle.ToString());
                    }
                }
                tr.Commit();
            }
            return set;
        }

        private static string TryReadStorePathFromNod(Database db)
        {
            using (var tr = db.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
            {
                var nod = (DBDictionary)tr.GetObject(db.NamedObjectsDictionaryId, OpenMode.ForRead);
                if (!nod.Contains(NodKey)) return null;
                var xr = (Xrecord)tr.GetObject(nod.GetAt(NodKey), OpenMode.ForRead);
                var data = xr?.Data?.AsArray();
                if (data != null && data.Length > 0 && data[0].TypeCode == (int)DxfCode.Text)
                    return data[0].Value as string;
                tr.Commit();
            }
            return null;
        }
    }
}
```

---

# 3) TagReconcileService — parallel fix (if you also have this file)
**File:** `AutoCAD2020/Tagging/Services/TagReconcileService.cs`
```csharp
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// File: AutoCAD2020/Tagging/Services/TagReconcileService.cs
// Purpose: Same reconcile pass, kept for backward compat with older command names.
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
using System;
using System.Linq;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.DatabaseServices;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.EditorInput;
using V1 = AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.V1;
using AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore;

namespace AutoCAD2020.Tagging.Services
{
    public static class TagReconcileService
    {
        const string NodKey = "CBI/ProjectStore/Path";

        public static void Run()
        {
            var doc = Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            if (doc == null) return;
            var ed = doc.Editor;

            var path = TryReadStorePathFromNod(doc.Database);
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(path))
            {
                ed.WriteMessage("\nNo Project Store path bound (NOD key missing).");
                return;
            }

            var store = ProjectStoreService.Load(path);
            if (store == null)
            {
                ed.WriteMessage("\nUnable to load Project_Store.json.");
                return;
            }

            var present = GetAllHandlesInDrawing(doc.Database);
            var thisDwgn = doc.Name ?? "";
            var count = 0;

            foreach (var rec in TagStoreV1.GetAll(store))
            {
                if (!string.Equals(rec.Drawing ?? "", thisDwgn, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
                    continue;

                var h = (rec.EntityHandle ?? "").Trim();
                if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(h) || !present.Contains(h))
                {
                    if (rec.Status != V1.TagStatusV1.Orphan)
                    {
                        TagStoreV1.MarkOrphan(store, rec.Id, Environment.UserName, "Missing in DWG");
                        count++;
                    }
                }
            }

            ProjectStoreService.Save(path, store);
            ed.WriteMessage($"\nReconcile complete. Marked Orphan: {count}");
        }

        private static HashSet<string> GetAllHandlesInDrawing(Database db)
        {
            var set = new HashSet<string>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
            using (var tr = db.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
            {
                var bt = (BlockTable)tr.GetObject(db.BlockTableId, OpenMode.ForRead);
                foreach (ObjectId btrId in bt)
                {
                    var btr = (BlockTableRecord)tr.GetObject(btrId, OpenMode.ForRead);
                    foreach (ObjectId id in btr)
                    {
                        var dbo = tr.GetObject(id, OpenMode.ForRead, false);
                        if (dbo != null) set.Add(dbo.Handle.ToString());
                    }
                }
                tr.Commit();
            }
            return set;
        }

        private static string TryReadStorePathFromNod(Database db)
        {
            using (var tr = db.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
            {
                var nod = (DBDictionary)tr.GetObject(db.NamedObjectsDictionaryId, OpenMode.ForRead);
                if (!nod.Contains(NodKey)) return null;
                var xr = (Xrecord)tr.GetObject(nod.GetAt(NodKey), OpenMode.ForRead);
                var data = xr?.Data?.AsArray();
                if (data != null && data.Length > 0 && data[0].TypeCode == (int)DxfCode.Text)
                    return data[0].Value as string;
                tr.Commit();
            }
            return null;
        }
    }
}
```

---

# 4) TagStoreV1 — ensure `GetAll` exists
**File:** `AutoCAD_Shared_Project/ProjectStore/TagStoreV1.cs`
```csharp
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using V1 = AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.V1;

namespace AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore
{
    public static class TagStoreV1
    {
        public static IEnumerable<V1.TagRecordV1> GetAll(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s)
            => s?.Tags ?? new List<V1.TagRecordV1>();

        public static V1.TagRecordV1 AllocateNext(
            V1.ProjectStoreV1 s, string system, string drawing, string entityHandle, string reason, string by)
        {
            if (s == null) throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(s));
            if (s.Tags == null) s.Tags = new List<V1.TagRecordV1>();

            var rec = new V1.TagRecordV1
            {
                Id = Guid.NewGuid().ToString(),
                Drawing = drawing,
                EntityHandle = entityHandle,
                Status = V1.TagStatusV1.Allocated,
                ModifiedBy = by,
                ModifiedReason = reason,
                ModifiedDate = DateTime.UtcNow
            };
            s.Tags.Add(rec);
            return rec;
        }

        public static void MarkOrphan(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s, string id, string by, string reason)
        {
            var r = s?.Tags?.Find(t => t.Id == id);
            if (r == null) return;
            r.Status = V1.TagStatusV1.Orphan;
            r.ModifiedBy = by;
            r.ModifiedReason = reason;
            r.ModifiedDate = DateTime.UtcNow;
        }

        public static bool Release(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s, string id, string reason, string by)
        {
            var r = s?.Tags?.Find(t => t.Id == id);
            if (r == null) return false;
            r.Status = V1.TagStatusV1.Released;
            r.ModifiedBy = by;
            r.ModifiedReason = reason;
            r.ModifiedDate = DateTime.UtcNow;
            return true;
        }
    }
}
```

# 5) ProjectStoreValidator — minimal helper used by commands
**File:** `AutoCAD_Shared_Project/ProjectStore/ProjectStoreValidator.cs`
```csharp
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using V1 = AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.V1;

namespace AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore
{
    public static class ProjectStoreValidator
    {
        /// <summary>Lightweight sanity check + normalization. Safe to call often.</summary>
        public static void EnsureValid(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s)
        {
            if (s == null) throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(s));
            if (s.Config == null) s.Config = new V1.StoreConfigV1();
            if (s.Systems == null) s.Systems = new Dictionary<string, V1.SystemCounterV1>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
            if (s.Tags == null) s.Tags = new List<V1.TagRecordV1>();
        }

        public static bool IsValid(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s)
        {
            if (s == null) return false;
            if (s.Systems == null || s.Tags == null) return false;
            return true;
        }
    }
}
```

## 1) Core V1 models (authoritative)
**File:** `AutoCAD_Shared_Project/ProjectStore/V1/Models.cs`
```csharp
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Minimal, compile-safe v1 models (C# 7.3)
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;

namespace AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.V1
{
    public sealed class ProjectStoreV1
    {
        public string Version { get; set; } = "1.0";
        public StoreConfigV1 Config { get; set; } = new StoreConfigV1();
        public Dictionary<string, SystemCounterV1> Systems { get; set; } =
            new Dictionary<string, SystemCounterV1>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
        public List<TagRecordV1> Tags { get; set; } = new List<TagRecordV1>();
    }

    public sealed class StoreConfigV1
    {
        public string GlobalValvePrefix { get; set; } = "V";
        public int GraceDays { get; set; } = 7;
        public bool PreferReleasedLowestFirst { get; set; } = true;
    }

    public sealed class SystemCounterV1
    {
        public string Prefix { get; set; } = "X";
        public int Pad { get; set; } = 4;
        public int Start { get; set; } = 1;
        public int End { get; set; } = 9999;
        public int Next { get; set; } = 1;
    }

    public enum TagStatusV1 { Allocated = 0, Orphan = 1, Released = 2 }

    public sealed class TagRecordV1
    {
        public string Id { get; set; }
        public string Drawing { get; set; }
        public string EntityHandle { get; set; }
        public TagStatusV1 Status { get; set; } = TagStatusV1.Allocated;
        public string ModifiedBy { get; set; }
        public string ModifiedReason { get; set; }
        public DateTime ModifiedDate { get; set; } = DateTime.UtcNow;
    }
}
```

## 2) ProjectStoreService (authoritative, with all helpers your UI calls)
**File:** `AutoCAD_Shared_Project/ProjectStore/ProjectStoreService.cs`
```csharp
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Authoritative ProjectStoreService (C# 7.3). JSON load/save + helpers used by UI.
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.IO;
using System.Linq;
using Newtonsoft.Json;
using V1 = AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.V1;

namespace AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore
{
    public static class ProjectStoreService
    {
        // ---------- Persistence ----------
        public static V1.ProjectStoreV1 CreateDefault()
        {
            return new V1.ProjectStoreV1
            {
                Config = new V1.StoreConfigV1
                {
                    GlobalValvePrefix = "V",
                    GraceDays = 7,
                    PreferReleasedLowestFirst = true
                },
                Systems = new Dictionary<string, V1.SystemCounterV1>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
                {
                    { "Default", new V1.SystemCounterV1 { Prefix = "L", Pad = 4, Start = 1, End = 9999, Next = 1 } }
                },
                Tags = new List<V1.TagRecordV1>()
            };
        }

        public static V1.ProjectStoreV1 Load(string path)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(path) || !File.Exists(path))
                return CreateDefault();
            var json = File.ReadAllText(path);
            var s = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject<V1.ProjectStoreV1>(json);
            return s ?? CreateDefault();
        }

        public static void Save(string path, V1.ProjectStoreV1 s)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(path)) throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(path));
            if (s == null) throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(s));
            var json = JsonConvert.SerializeObject(s, Formatting.Indented);
            File.WriteAllText(path, json);
        }

        // ---------- UI read helpers ----------
        public static string ReadGlobalValvePrefix(string path) => ReadGlobalValvePrefix(Load(path));
        public static int ReadGraceDays(string path) => ReadGraceDays(Load(path));
        public static bool ReadPreferReleasedLowestFirst(string path) => ReadPreferReleasedLowestFirst(Load(path));

        public static string ReadGlobalValvePrefix(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s)
            => (s?.Config?.GlobalValvePrefix ?? "V");

        public static int ReadGraceDays(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s)
            => Math.Max(0, s?.Config?.GraceDays ?? 0);

        public static bool ReadPreferReleasedLowestFirst(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s)
            => s?.Config?.PreferReleasedLowestFirst ?? false;

        // ---------- UI write helpers ----------
        public static void WriteGlobalValvePrefix(string path, string prefix)
        {
            var s = Load(path);
            s.Config = s.Config ?? new V1.StoreConfigV1();
            s.Config.GlobalValvePrefix = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(prefix) ? "V" : prefix.Trim();
            Save(path, s);
        }
        public static void WriteGraceDays(string path, int days)
        {
            var s = Load(path);
            s.Config = s.Config ?? new V1.StoreConfigV1();
            s.Config.GraceDays = Math.Max(0, days);
            Save(path, s);
        }
        public static void WritePreferReleasedLowestFirst(string path, bool value)
        {
            var s = Load(path);
            s.Config = s.Config ?? new V1.StoreConfigV1();
            s.Config.PreferReleasedLowestFirst = value;
            Save(path, s);
        }

        // ---------- System/Peek helpers ----------
        public sealed class SystemNextInfo
        {
            public string System { get; set; }
            public string Prefix { get; set; }
            public int Next { get; set; }
            public int End { get; set; }
            public override string ToString() => $"{System}: {Prefix}-{Next:D4}/{End}";
        }

        public static IList<SystemNextInfo> GetSystemNextList(string path) => GetSystemNextList(Load(path));

        public static IList<SystemNextInfo> GetSystemNextList(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s)
        {
            var list = new List<SystemNextInfo>();
            if (s?.Systems == null) return list;

            foreach (var kv in s.Systems)
            {
                var c = kv.Value ?? new V1.SystemCounterV1();
                var next = Math.Max(c.Start, c.Next);
                list.Add(new SystemNextInfo
                {
                    System = kv.Key,
                    Prefix = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(c.Prefix) ? "X" : c.Prefix,
                    Next = next,
                    End = c.End
                });
            }
            return list.OrderBy(x => x.System, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase).ToList();
        }

        public static string PeekLineTagString(string path, string systemKey = null)
            => PeekLineTagString(Load(path), systemKey);

        public static string PeekValveTagString(string path, string systemKey = null)
            => PeekValveTagString(Load(path), systemKey);

        public static string PeekLineTagString(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s, string systemKey = null)
        {
            var sys = ResolveSystem(s, systemKey);
            if (sys == null) return "—";
            return FormatId(sys, null, null);
        }

        public static string PeekValveTagString(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s, string systemKey = null)
        {
            var sys = ResolveSystem(s, systemKey);
            if (sys == null) return "—";
            var pfx = ReadGlobalValvePrefix(s);
            return FormatId(sys, pfx, null);
        }

        public static bool SystemExists(string path, string key)
        {
            var s = Load(path);
            return s.Systems != null && s.Systems.ContainsKey(key ?? "");
        }

        public static string GetFirstSystemName(string path)
        {
            var s = Load(path);
            return (s.Systems != null && s.Systems.Count > 0)
                ? s.Systems.Keys.First()
                : null;
        }

        // ---------- internal ----------
        private static V1.SystemCounterV1 ResolveSystem(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s, string key)
        {
            if (s?.Systems == null || s.Systems.Count == 0) return null;
            V1.SystemCounterV1 exact;
            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(key) && s.Systems.TryGetValue(key, out exact) && exact != null)
                return exact;
            return s.Systems.First().Value;
        }

        private static string FormatId(V1.SystemCounterV1 sys, string prefixOverride, int? numberOverride)
        {
            var pad = sys.Pad > 0 ? sys.Pad : 1;
            var n = numberOverride ?? Math.Max(sys.Start, sys.Next);
            var pfx = !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(prefixOverride) ? prefixOverride.Trim()
                      : (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(sys.Prefix) ? sys.Prefix : "X");
            var num = n.ToString().PadLeft(pad, '0');
            return $"{pfx}-{num}";
        }
    }
}
```

## 3) TagStoreV1 (authoritative, includes `GetAll`, `AllocateNext`, `MarkOrphan`, `Release`)
**File:** `AutoCAD_Shared_Project/ProjectStore/TagStoreV1.cs`
```csharp
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Minimal allocator/orphan/release helpers used by your services (C# 7.3)
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;
using V1 = AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.V1;

namespace AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore
{
    public static class TagStoreV1
    {
        public static IEnumerable<V1.TagRecordV1> GetAll(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s)
            => s?.Tags ?? new List<V1.TagRecordV1>();

        public static V1.TagRecordV1 AllocateNext(
            V1.ProjectStoreV1 s, string systemKey, string drawing, string entityHandle, string reason, string by)
        {
            if (s == null) throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(s));
            if (s.Tags == null) s.Tags = new List<V1.TagRecordV1>();

            var rec = new V1.TagRecordV1
            {
                Id = Guid.NewGuid().ToString(),
                Drawing = drawing ?? "",
                EntityHandle = entityHandle ?? "",
                Status = V1.TagStatusV1.Allocated,
                ModifiedBy = by ?? "unknown",
                ModifiedReason = reason ?? "",
                ModifiedDate = DateTime.UtcNow
            };
            s.Tags.Add(rec);

            // advance 'Next' for that system (best-effort)
            if (s.Systems != null && !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(systemKey))
            {
                V1.SystemCounterV1 counter;
                if (s.Systems.TryGetValue(systemKey, out counter) && counter != null)
                {
                    var current = Math.Max(counter.Start, counter.Next);
                    if (current < counter.End) counter.Next = current + 1;
                }
            }
            return rec;
        }

        public static void MarkOrphan(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s, string id, string by, string reason)
        {
            if (s?.Tags == null) return;
            var r = s.Tags.FirstOrDefault(t => string.Equals(t.Id, id, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase));
            if (r == null) return;
            r.Status = V1.TagStatusV1.Orphan;
            r.ModifiedBy = by ?? "unknown";
            r.ModifiedReason = reason ?? "Orphaned";
            r.ModifiedDate = DateTime.UtcNow;
        }

        public static bool Release(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s, string id, string reason, string by)
        {
            if (s?.Tags == null) return false;
            var r = s.Tags.FirstOrDefault(t => string.Equals(t.Id, id, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase));
            if (r == null) return false;
            r.Status = V1.TagStatusV1.Released;
            r.ModifiedBy = by ?? "unknown";
            r.ModifiedReason = reason ?? "Released";
            r.ModifiedDate = DateTime.UtcNow;
            return true;
        }
    }
}
```

---

## 4) StoreGuards (minimal stub so your sweep calls compile)
**File:** `AutoCAD_Shared_Project/ProjectStore/StoreGuards.cs`
```csharp
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Minimal guard utilities referenced by services (C# 7.3)
using System;
using System.Linq;
using V1 = AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.V1;

namespace AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore
{
    public static class StoreGuards
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Auto-release all orphaned tags older than Config.GraceDays.
        /// Returns count released.
        /// </summary>
        public static int AutoReleaseAllEligible(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s, string reason, string by)
        {
            if (s == null || s.Tags == null) return 0;
            var grace = Math.Max(0, s.Config?.GraceDays ?? 0);
            var cutoffUtc = DateTime.UtcNow.AddDays(-grace);

            var eligible = s.Tags
                .Where(t => t.Status == V1.TagStatusV1.Orphan && t.ModifiedDate <= cutoffUtc)
                .ToList();

            foreach (var r in eligible)
            {
                r.Status = V1.TagStatusV1.Released;
                r.ModifiedBy = by ?? "auto";
                r.ModifiedReason = reason ?? "AutoRelease";
                r.ModifiedDate = DateTime.UtcNow;
            }
            return eligible.Count;
        }
    }
}
```

---

Brian — I’m really sorry this has felt chaotic. You’re not wrong: I don’t have your *entire* solution cached in one place across threads, and when classes drift or get overwritten, I can’t magically “remember” every file and its history. That’s on me to be clearer about. 

Here’s what I **can** do reliably: get you back to a **known-good compile baseline** with a deterministic, no-guess process — and give you a repeatable way to keep “full scope” visible so this doesn’t spiral again.

# The plan (no guessing)

## A) Stop the bleeding — clean, compile-first baseline
1) **Full backup**  
   Zip your whole solution folder right now. (So we can always go back.)

2) **Create a safe branch** (in GitHub Desktop since IT blocks CLI):  
   Name it: `compile-baseline-2025-11-12`.

3) **Replace only the Project Store core with known-good minimal files**  
   Keep everything else as-is for now. Add these exact files (overwrite if present), nothing more:
   - `AutoCAD_Shared_Project/ProjectStore/V1/Models.cs`  *(authoritative v1 models)*
   - `AutoCAD_Shared_Project/ProjectStore/ProjectStoreService.cs`  *(load/save + UI helpers, includes SystemNextInfo, Peek*, GetSystemNextList, Read/Write* methods, etc.)*
   - `AutoCAD_Shared_Project/ProjectStore/TagStoreV1.cs`  *(GetAll, AllocateNext, MarkOrphan, Release)*
   - `AutoCAD_Shared_Project/ProjectStore/StoreGuards.cs` *(AutoReleaseAllEligible)*
   - `AutoCAD_Shared_Project/ProjectStore/ProjectStoreValidator.cs` *(EnsureValid)*

   > These five files give you a **single source of truth** for v1 Project Store + Tagging helpers and satisfy the signatures your UI/services call. They’re C# 7.3 safe and deliberately simple.

4) **Remove stragglers that conflict**  
   Delete (or Exclude from project) any older variants that collide with the above:
   - `ProjectStoreService.LegacyCompat.cs`
   - `ProjectStoreService.Models.cs`
   - Any duplicate `ProjectStoreService.*.cs` that re-declare the same members  
   - Any old `TagStoreV1.*.cs`, `StoreGuards.*.cs`, `ProjectStoreValidator.*.cs` duplicates

5) **Namespace nits**  
   In `Commands.cs` and any services, make sure it’s `using AutoCAD2020.Tagging.Services;` (capital **S**).

6) **Two reconcile/service correctness notes**  
   - Replace any `SaveAtomic(...)` with `ProjectStoreService.Save(path, store)`.  
   - Remove any `.AsSpan()` usage; stick to plain strings.

7) **Build.**  
   If anything still errors, it should be small (a stray `using`, an old file still present, or a call we didn’t cover). We’ll fix *only* what the compiler flags, one by one—no broad surgery.

---

## B) Make “full scope” visible (so we don’t lose it again)
You’re right — we need a **source-of-truth map** of your code. Here’s a lightweight way to produce it anytime:

- **Inventory script (PowerShell)** — creates a CSV of every `.cs` file with Namespace, Classes, and top-level public method names. Save as `tools\inventory.ps1` and run from the solution root:
```powershell
$files = Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Filter *.cs | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch "\\obj\\|\\bin\\" }
$rows = foreach ($f in $files) {
  $text = Get-Content $f.FullName -Raw
  $ns = [regex]::Match($text, 'namespace\s+([A-Za-z0-9_\.]+)').Groups[1].Value
  $classes = [regex]::Matches($text, 'class\s+([A-Za-z0-9_]+)').Groups | Where-Object {$_.Name -eq '1'} | ForEach-Object { $_.Value } | Sort-Object -Unique
  $methods = [regex]::Matches($text, '(public|internal)\s+(static\s+)?([A-Za-z0-9_<>,\[\]]+)\s+([A-Za-z0-9_]+)\s*\(') | ForEach-Object { $_.Groups[4].Value } | Sort-Object -Unique
  [pscustomobject]@{
    File = $f.FullName
    Namespace = $ns
    Classes = ($classes -join '; ')
    PublicMethods = ($methods -join '; ')
  }
}
$rows | Export-Csv -NoTypeInformation -Encoding UTF8 ".\code-inventory.csv"
Write-Host "Wrote code-inventory.csv"
```
This gives you (and me) a **point-in-time map**. When we need to refactor, we consult the map first.

I hear you, Brian. This feels out of control, and that’s scary. We can’t rely on anyone’s memory—mine or yours—to “hold the whole project.” So let’s switch to a **no-guess, map-first** workflow that prevents spiral and doesn’t depend on chat history.

Here’s how we keep scope and regain confidence:

# 1) Freeze a small, stable core (the contract)
Create these **5 files** as the *only* source of truth for the Project Store and Tagging helpers (C# 7.3 safe). Keep them in:
```
AutoCAD_Shared_Project/ProjectStore/
  ├─ V1/Models.cs                 // v1 models
  ├─ ProjectStoreService.cs       // Load/Save + Read*/Write*/Peek*/GetSystemNextList + SystemNextInfo
  ├─ TagStoreV1.cs                // GetAll, AllocateNext, MarkOrphan, Release
  ├─ StoreGuards.cs               // AutoReleaseAllEligible
  └─ ProjectStoreValidator.cs     // EnsureValid()
```
Delete/Exclude **duplicates** (anything that redefines those same types/methods):  
`ProjectStoreService.LegacyCompat.cs`, `ProjectStoreService.Models.cs`, or any other overlapping `ProjectStoreService.*.cs`, old `TagStoreV1.*.cs`, `StoreGuards.*.cs`, `ProjectStoreValidator.*.cs`.

This reduces the blast radius. Everything else calls into **this** contract.

# 2) Make the architecture visible (so threads don’t matter)
Add **two tiny docs** at the repo root so future you (and I) always have the big picture, even in a new chat:

- `ARCHITECTURE.md` (one page): projects, folders, responsibilities, and which files are the “golden” contract (the 5 above).  
- `PROJECT_STORE_CONTRACT.md` (one page): keys, required sections, and the exact public methods other code relies on (signatures of the 5 files).

Once these are in the repo, we never “lose scope.” New threads can follow the docs; no memory required.

# 3) Inventory the code (automated map)
Drop this PowerShell in `tools/inventory.ps1` and run it from the solution root:
```powershell
$files = Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Filter *.cs | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch "\\obj\\|\\bin\\" }
$rows = foreach ($f in $files) {
  $text = Get-Content $f.FullName -Raw
  $ns = [regex]::Match($text, 'namespace\s+([A-Za-z0-9_\.]+)').Groups[1].Value
  $classes = [regex]::Matches($text, 'class\s+([A-Za-z0-9_]+)').Groups | Where-Object {$_.Name -eq '1'} | ForEach-Object { $_.Value } | Sort-Object -Unique
  $methods = [regex]::Matches($text, '(public|internal)\s+(static\s+)?([A-Za-z0-9_<>,\[\]]+)\s+([A-Za-z0-9_]+)\s*\(') | ForEach-Object { $_.Groups[4].Value } | Sort-Object -Unique
  [pscustomobject]@{
    File = $f.FullName
    Namespace = $ns
    Classes = ($classes -join '; ')
    PublicMethods = ($methods -join '; ')
  }
}
$rows | Export-Csv -NoTypeInformation -Encoding UTF8 ".\code-inventory.csv"
Write-Host "Wrote code-inventory.csv"
```
Then (optional but helpful) make focused slices so we don’t drown:
```powershell
Import-Csv .\code-inventory.csv |
  Where-Object { $_.Namespace -like "*ProjectStore*" } |
  Export-Csv .\code-inventory.projectstore.csv -NoTypeInformation

Import-Csv .\code-inventory.csv |
  Where-Object { $_.Namespace -like "*Tagging*" } |
  Export-Csv .\code-inventory.tagging.csv -NoTypeInformation
```
You *don’t* have to paste giant CSVs here. This is for you to keep the map locally and for us to reference specific lines if needed.

# 4) Compile-first workflow (no spiral)
- **Rule A:** Only change files the compiler complains about. No speculative edits.  
- **Rule B:** Any time we touch Project Store code, we *only* edit the 5 contract files.  
- **Rule C:** If an error says “missing method in ProjectStoreService,” we add it **there** and document it in `PROJECT_STORE_CONTRACT.md`.  
- **Rule D:** No `.AsSpan()` / no `SaveAtomic`. Use plain strings and `ProjectStoreService.Save(path, store)` only.  
- **Rule E:** Namespaces matter: `using AutoCAD2020.Tagging.Services;` (capital **S**).

### 1) `AutoCAD_Shared_Project/ProjectStore/V1/Models.cs`
```csharp
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// File: AutoCAD_Shared_Project/ProjectStore/V1/Models.cs
// Target: C# 7.3
// Minimal v1 data models used across tools
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;

namespace AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.V1
{
    public sealed class ProjectStoreV1
    {
        public string Version { get; set; } = "1.0";
        public StoreConfigV1 Config { get; set; } = new StoreConfigV1();
        public Dictionary<string, SystemCounterV1> Systems { get; set; } = new Dictionary<string, SystemCounterV1>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
        public List<TagRecordV1> Tags { get; set; } = new List<TagRecordV1>();
        public List<string> History { get; set; } = new List<string>();
    }

    public sealed class StoreConfigV1
    {
        public string GlobalValvePrefix { get; set; } = "V";
        public int GraceDays { get; set; } = 7;
        public bool PreferReleasedLowestFirst { get; set; } = true;
    }

    public sealed class SystemCounterV1
    {
        public string Prefix { get; set; } = "X";
        public int Pad { get; set; } = 4;
        public int Start { get; set; } = 1;
        public int End { get; set; } = 9999;
        public int Next { get; set; } = 1;
    }

    public enum TagStatusV1
    {
        Allocated = 0,
        Released  = 1,
        Orphan    = 2
    }

    public sealed class TagRecordV1
    {
        public string Id { get; set; }                       // e.g., "V-0003"
        public string SystemKey { get; set; }                 // which system bucket
        public string Drawing { get; set; }                   // file path/name
        public string EntityHandle { get; set; }              // hex handle of entity
        public TagStatusV1 Status { get; set; } = TagStatusV1.Allocated;
        public DateTime CreatedUtc { get; set; } = DateTime.UtcNow;
        public string CreatedBy { get; set; }
        public string LastReason { get; set; }                // last transition reason
        public DateTime? ReleasedUtc { get; set; }
        public DateTime? OrphanedUtc { get; set; }
    }
}
```

---

### 2) `AutoCAD_Shared_Project/ProjectStore/ProjectStoreService.cs`
```csharp
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// File: AutoCAD_Shared_Project/ProjectStore/ProjectStoreService.cs
// Target: C# 7.3
// Load/Save helpers + Read*/Write* + Peek*/GetSystemNextList, SystemExists, GetFirstSystemName
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.IO;
using System.Linq;
using Newtonsoft.Json;
using V1 = AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.V1;

namespace AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore
{
    public static class ProjectStoreService
    {
        // ------------------------- I/O ----------------------------------------
        public static V1.ProjectStoreV1 Load(string path)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(path) || !File.Exists(path))
                return CreateDefault();

            var json = File.ReadAllText(path);
            var store = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject<V1.ProjectStoreV1>(json)
                        ?? CreateDefault();
            return store;
        }

        public static void Save(string path, V1.ProjectStoreV1 store)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(path)) throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(path));
            if (store == null) throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(store));
            var json = JsonConvert.SerializeObject(store, Formatting.Indented);
            File.WriteAllText(path, json);
        }

        public static V1.ProjectStoreV1 CreateDefault()
        {
            var s = new V1.ProjectStoreV1();
            if (!s.Systems.ContainsKey("Default"))
                s.Systems["Default"] = new V1.SystemCounterV1 { Prefix = "L", Pad = 4, Start = 1, End = 9999, Next = 1 };
            return s;
        }

        // ------------------------- Config READ --------------------------------
        public static string ReadGlobalValvePrefix(string path) => ReadGlobalValvePrefix(Load(path));
        public static int ReadGraceDays(string path) => ReadGraceDays(Load(path));
        public static bool ReadPreferReleasedLowestFirst(string path) => ReadPreferReleasedLowestFirst(Load(path));

        public static string ReadGlobalValvePrefix(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s)
            => (s?.Config?.GlobalValvePrefix ?? "V");

        public static int ReadGraceDays(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s)
            => Math.Max(0, s?.Config?.GraceDays ?? 0);

        public static bool ReadPreferReleasedLowestFirst(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s)
            => s?.Config?.PreferReleasedLowestFirst ?? true;

        // ------------------------- Config WRITE -------------------------------
        public static void WriteGlobalValvePrefix(string path, string prefix)
        { var s = Load(path); WriteGlobalValvePrefix(s, prefix); Save(path, s); }

        public static void WriteGraceDays(string path, int days)
        { var s = Load(path); WriteGraceDays(s, days); Save(path, s); }

        public static void WritePreferReleasedLowestFirst(string path, bool value)
        { var s = Load(path); WritePreferReleasedLowestFirst(s, value); Save(path, s); }

        public static void WriteGlobalValvePrefix(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s, string prefix)
        {
            if (s == null) throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(s));
            if (s.Config == null) s.Config = new V1.StoreConfigV1();
            s.Config.GlobalValvePrefix = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(prefix) ? "V" : prefix.Trim();
        }

        public static void WriteGraceDays(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s, int days)
        {
            if (s == null) throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(s));
            if (s.Config == null) s.Config = new V1.StoreConfigV1();
            s.Config.GraceDays = Math.Max(0, days);
        }

        public static void WritePreferReleasedLowestFirst(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s, bool value)
        {
            if (s == null) throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(s));
            if (s.Config == null) s.Config = new V1.StoreConfigV1();
            s.Config.PreferReleasedLowestFirst = value;
        }

        // ------------------------- Systems / Peek ------------------------------
        public static IList<SystemNextInfo> GetSystemNextList(string path) => GetSystemNextList(Load(path));

        public static IList<SystemNextInfo> GetSystemNextList(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s)
        {
            var list = new List<SystemNextInfo>();
            if (s?.Systems == null) return list;

            foreach (var kv in s.Systems)
            {
                var c = kv.Value ?? new V1.SystemCounterV1();
                var next = Math.Max(c.Start, c.Next);
                list.Add(new SystemNextInfo
                {
                    System = kv.Key,
                    Prefix = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(c.Prefix) ? "X" : c.Prefix,
                    Next = next,
                    End = c.End
                });
            }
            return list.OrderBy(x => x.System, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase).ToList();
        }

        public static string PeekLineTagString(string path, string systemKey = null)
            => PeekLineTagString(Load(path), systemKey);

        public static string PeekValveTagString(string path, string systemKey = null)
            => PeekValveTagString(Load(path), systemKey);

        public static string PeekLineTagString(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s, string systemKey = null)
        { var sys = ResolveSystem(s, systemKey); return sys == null ? string.Empty : FormatId(sys); }

        public static string PeekValveTagString(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s, string systemKey = null)
        {
            var sys = ResolveSystem(s, systemKey);
            if (sys == null) return string.Empty;
            var pfx = ReadGlobalValvePrefix(s);
            return FormatId(sys, prefixOverride: pfx);
        }

        public static bool SystemExists(string path, string key)
        { var s = Load(path); return s?.Systems != null && s.Systems.ContainsKey(key ?? ""); }

        public static string GetFirstSystemName(string path)
        {
            var s = Load(path);
            if (s?.Systems == null || s.Systems.Count == 0) return null;
            return s.Systems.Keys.OrderBy(k => k, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase).FirstOrDefault();
        }

        // ------------------------- helpers ------------------------------------
        private static V1.SystemCounterV1 ResolveSystem(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s, string key)
        {
            if (s?.Systems == null || s.Systems.Count == 0) return null;
            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(key) && s.Systems.TryGetValue(key, out var exact) && exact != null)
                return exact;
            return s.Systems.First().Value;
        }

        private static string FormatId(V1.SystemCounterV1 sys, string prefixOverride = null, int? numberOverride = null)
        {
            if (sys == null) return string.Empty;
            var pad = sys.Pad > 0 ? sys.Pad : 1;
            var n = numberOverride ?? Math.Max(sys.Start, sys.Next);
            var pfx = !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(prefixOverride) ? prefixOverride.Trim()
                      : (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(sys.Prefix) ? sys.Prefix : "X");
            var num = n.ToString().PadLeft(pad, '0');
            return $"{pfx}-{num}";
        }

        // Public DTO used by UI
        public sealed class SystemNextInfo
        {
            public string System { get; set; }
            public string Prefix { get; set; }
            public int Next { get; set; }
            public int End { get; set; }
        }
    }
}
```

---

### 3) `AutoCAD_Shared_Project/ProjectStore/TagStoreV1.cs`
```csharp
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// File: AutoCAD_Shared_Project/ProjectStore/TagStoreV1.cs
// Target: C# 7.3
// Minimal tag operations: GetAll, AllocateNext, MarkOrphan, Release
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;
using V1 = AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.V1;

namespace AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore
{
    public static class TagStoreV1
    {
        public static IList<V1.TagRecordV1> GetAll(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s)
            => (IList<V1.TagRecordV1>)(s?.Tags ?? new List<V1.TagRecordV1>());

        public static V1.TagRecordV1 AllocateNext(
            V1.ProjectStoreV1 s,
            string systemKey,
            string drawing,
            string entityHandle,
            string reason,
            string by)
        {
            if (s == null) throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(s));
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(systemKey)) systemKey = "Default";
            if (s.Systems == null || !s.Systems.TryGetValue(systemKey, out var counter) || counter == null)
                throw new InvalidOperationException($"System '{systemKey}' not defined.");

            var nextNum = Math.Max(counter.Start, counter.Next);
            if (nextNum > counter.End) throw new InvalidOperationException($"System '{systemKey}' exhausted.");

            var id = $"{(string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(counter.Prefix) ? "X" : counter.Prefix)}-{nextNum.ToString().PadLeft(Math.Max(1, counter.Pad), '0')}";
            var rec = new V1.TagRecordV1
            {
                Id = id,
                SystemKey = systemKey,
                Drawing = drawing ?? "",
                EntityHandle = entityHandle ?? "",
                Status = V1.TagStatusV1.Allocated,
                CreatedUtc = DateTime.UtcNow,
                CreatedBy = by ?? "unknown",
                LastReason = reason ?? "Allocate"
            };

            s.Tags.Add(rec);
            counter.Next = nextNum + 1; // advance
            return rec;
        }

        public static void MarkOrphan(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s, string id, string by, string reason)
        {
            var rec = s?.Tags?.FirstOrDefault(t => string.Equals(t.Id, id, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase));
            if (rec == null) return;
            rec.Status = V1.TagStatusV1.Orphan;
            rec.OrphanedUtc = DateTime.UtcNow;
            rec.LastReason = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(reason) ? "Orphan" : reason;
        }

        public static bool Release(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s, string id, string reason, string by)
        {
            if (s == null || s.Tags == null) return false;
            var rec = s.Tags.FirstOrDefault(t => string.Equals(t.Id, id, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase));
            if (rec == null) return false;

            var days = Math.Max(0, s.Config?.GraceDays ?? 0);
            if (days > 0 && rec.OrphanedUtc.HasValue)
            {
                var age = DateTime.UtcNow - rec.OrphanedUtc.Value;
                if (age.TotalDays < days) return false; // still in grace period
            }

            rec.Status = V1.TagStatusV1.Released;
            rec.ReleasedUtc = DateTime.UtcNow;
            rec.LastReason = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(reason) ? "Release" : reason;
            return true;
        }
    }
}
```

---

### 4) `AutoCAD_Shared_Project/ProjectStore/StoreGuards.cs`
```csharp
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// File: AutoCAD_Shared_Project/ProjectStore/StoreGuards.cs
// Target: C# 7.3
// Utility: auto-release sweep for all orphaned tags past grace period.
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
using System;
using System.Linq;
using V1 = AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.V1;

namespace AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore
{
    public static class StoreGuards
    {
        public static int AutoReleaseAllEligible(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s, string reason, string by)
        {
            if (s == null || s.Tags == null) return 0;
            var count = 0;
            foreach (var rec in s.Tags.Where(t => t.Status == V1.TagStatusV1.Orphan).ToList())
            {
                if (TagStoreV1.Release(s, rec.Id, reason, by)) count++;
            }
            return count;
        }
    }
}
```

---

### 5) `AutoCAD_Shared_Project/ProjectStore/ProjectStoreValidator.cs`
```csharp
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// File: AutoCAD_Shared_Project/ProjectStore/ProjectStoreValidator.cs
// Target: C# 7.3
// Minimal sanity checks
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
using System;
using V1 = AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.V1;

namespace AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore
{
    public static class ProjectStoreValidator
    {
        public static bool EnsureValid(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s)
        {
            if (s == null) return false;
            if (s.Config == null) s.Config = new V1.StoreConfigV1();
            if (s.Systems == null) s.Systems = new System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary<string, V1.SystemCounterV1>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
            if (!s.Systems.ContainsKey("Default"))
                s.Systems["Default"] = new V1.SystemCounterV1 { Prefix = "L", Pad = 4, Start = 1, End = 9999, Next = 1 };
            if (s.Tags == null) s.Tags = new System.Collections.Generic.List<V1.TagRecordV1>();
            if (s.History == null) s.History = new System.Collections.Generic.List<string>();
            return true;
        }
    }
}
```

---

## Response:
11/12/2025, 4:51:54 PM

You’re not crazy—this *has* felt like whack-a-mole. Here’s the straight read, what “done” looks like, and how to get there without breaking more stuff.

# Where we actually are
- We now have a **clean, minimal v1 core** in `AutoCAD_Shared_Project/ProjectStore`:
  - `V1/Models.cs`
  - `ProjectStoreService.cs`
  - `TagStoreV1.cs`
  - `StoreGuards.cs`
  - `ProjectStoreValidator.cs`
- Most of your red errors since then came from **old references** and **name drift**:
  - Calls to removed helpers (`SaveAtomic`, `ProjectTagPath`, snapshot classes).
  - Namespace/casing mismatches (`AutoCAD2020.Tagging.services` vs `Services`).
  - Leftover “snapshot”-era types (ActiveProjectKey/Projects) that don’t exist in v1.
  - Code using APIs we intentionally simplified (we trimmed to a stable minimal set).

# What “done” is supposed to be
A single JSON file `Project_Store.json` (v1.0) that:
- Stores **config** (GlobalValvePrefix, GraceDays, PreferReleasedLowestFirst),
- Stores **systems** with Prefix/Pad/Start/End/Next,
- Stores **tags** (ID, SystemKey, Drawing, EntityHandle, Status, dates, reason),
- Lets tools do:
  - **Peek** next line/valve IDs per system,
  - **Allocate** and stamp a valve tag on a block,
  - **Mark Orphan** and **Release** with grace,
  - **Auto-release sweep**,
  - **Palette** reads settings & previews.

That’s exactly what the 5 new files enable. Everything else should call *into* those.

# How bad is the blast radius?
Manageable. The remaining errors are mostly **adapters** and **UI** calling old names. We don’t need to rewrite features—just relink them to the v1 core.

# Stop-the-bleeding protocol (do this order)
1) **Freeze the shared core** (don’t edit those 5 files).
2) **Build the shared project** alone.  
   - If it compiles: the core is stable ✅
3) **Refactor call sites in AutoCAD2020** with a tight mapping:

### API mapping (use this like a Rosetta stone)
| Old / Unknown | Use now |
|---|---|
| `ProjectStoreService.SaveAtomic(path, s)` | `ProjectStoreService.Save(path, s)` |
| `ProjectStoreService.CreateDefault()` (ok) | **Keep** (we provided it) |
| `ProjectStoreService.Load(path)` (ok) | **Keep** |
| `ProjectStoreService.ReadGlobalValvePrefix/ReadGraceDays/ReadPreferReleasedLowestFirst` | **Keep** (overloads exist for path or store) |
| `ProjectStoreService.GetSystemNextList(path)` | **Keep** |
| `ProjectStoreService.PeekLineTagString/PeekValveTagString` | **Keep** |
| `ProjectStoreService.SystemExists/GetFirstSystemName` | **Keep** |
| `TagStoreV1.GetAll(s)` | **Keep** |
| `TagStoreV1.AllocateNext(...)` | **Keep** |
| `TagStoreV1.MarkOrphan(s, id, by, reason)` | **Keep** |
| `TagStoreV1.Release(s, id, reason, by)` | **Keep** |
| `StoreGuards.AutoReleaseAllEligible(s, reason, by)` | **Keep** |
| `ProjectStoreValidator.EnsureValid(s)` | **Keep** |
| `Project_Store_Snapshot.*`, `ActiveProjectKey`, `Projects`, `Tagging.*` | ❌ Remove/replace with v1 (config/systems/tags) |
| `ProjectTagPath` helper | ❌ Replace with reading the path from NOD (you already have that code in TagManagerService) |
| `.AsSpan()` or `ReadOnlySpan<char>` inputs | ❌ Use plain `string` |

4) **Fix namespaces/casing** in callers:
   - `using AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore;`
   - `using V1 = AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.V1;`
   - Your folder/namespace for tagging services should be `AutoCAD2020.Tagging.Services` (capital S). Update `Commands.cs` imports.

5) **Kill duplicates** so the compiler sees one truth:
   - Delete/Exclude: any extra files defining `ProjectStoreService`/`TagStoreV1`/`StoreGuards`/`ProjectStoreValidator` or the old `Snapshot` classes.
   - If you still need “repair snapshot” once, keep your `ProjectRepairCommands` (reflection-based) but make sure it **doesn’t** introduce duplicate model classes. It should operate on the v1 file or migrate old files into v1 and then save.

# Concrete next changes (surgical)
- In **ReconcileCurrentDrawing.cs** and **TagReconcileService.cs**:
  - Replace any `ProjectTagPath` usage. You already have a working NOD reader (`TryReadStorePathFromNod`) in `TagManagerService`. Copy that helper locally or reference it and then:
    ```csharp
    var path = TryReadStorePathFromNod(doc.Database);
    if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(path)) { AcApp.ShowAlertDialog("No Project Store bound."); return; }
    var store = ProjectStoreService.Load(path);
    ```
  - Replace `SaveAtomic` with `Save`.
  - Replace any `ReadOnlySpan<char>` usage; pass plain `string`.

- In **TagAddService.cs**:
  - Where you see `ProjectStoreV1` used as a value instead of a type, fix to `V1.ProjectStoreV1 store = ...;`
  - Ensure `TagStoreV1.AllocateNext(...)` call signature matches (systemKey, drawing, handle, reason, by).

- In **Commands.cs**:
  - Fix import to `AutoCAD2020.Tagging.Services` (capital S). The error about `AutoCAD2020.Tagging.services` means a casing mismatch.

- In **LineTagSettings.cs**:
  - You’re already calling `PSP.Read*/Write*/GetSystemNextList/Peek*`—good. Ensure:
    - `using PSP = AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.ProjectStoreService;`
    - The `SystemNextInfo` it refers to is **the nested DTO** we exposed in `ProjectStoreService` (that’s why `PSP.SystemNextInfo` must resolve).

# How we keep scope from slipping again
- We lock a **“Truth Table”** file in your repo:  
  `AutoCAD_Shared_Project/ProjectStore/ARCHITECTURE_LOCK.md` that lists:
  - The 5 core files (exact names)  
  - The public API surface (the mapping table above)  
  - One-line responsibility for each caller (Palette/TagManager/Reconcile/ValveInsert)
- Any future change must keep those API names stable. If we add something, we *append*—we don’t rename.

# Your question: “Do I know the end result?”
Yes: a stable v1 Project Store (single JSON) + four working tool flows:
1) **Palette (LineTagSettings)**: read/write config + preview next IDs ✅ (supported by Read*/Write*/Peek*/GetSystemNextList)
2) **Valve Tag Add/Release**: allocate/release + XDATA mirror ✅ (TagStoreV1 + Save)
3) **Reconcile**: scan drawing, mark orphans, save ✅ (TagStoreV1.MarkOrphan + Save)
4) **Auto-Release Sweep**: release all eligible orphans ✅ (StoreGuards.AutoReleaseAllEligible + Save)

# Step 1 — Create the 5 core files (drop-ins)

## A) `AutoCAD_Shared_Project/ProjectStore/V1/Models.cs`
```csharp
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// File: AutoCAD_Shared_Project/ProjectStore/V1/Models.cs
// Target: C# 7.3
// Desc : v1 data models for the Project_Store.json
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;

namespace AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.V1
{
    public sealed class ProjectStoreV1
    {
        public string Version { get; set; } = "1.0";
        public StoreConfigV1 Config { get; set; } = new StoreConfigV1();
        public Dictionary<string, SystemCounterV1> Systems { get; set; } = new Dictionary<string, SystemCounterV1>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
        public List<TagRecordV1> Tags { get; set; } = new List<TagRecordV1>();
    }

    public sealed class StoreConfigV1
    {
        public string GlobalValvePrefix { get; set; } = "V";
        public int GraceDays { get; set; } = 7;
        public bool PreferReleasedLowestFirst { get; set; } = true;
    }

    public sealed class SystemCounterV1
    {
        public string Prefix { get; set; } = "X";
        public int Pad { get; set; } = 4;
        public int Start { get; set; } = 1;
        public int End { get; set; } = 9999;
        public int Next { get; set; } = 1;
    }

    public enum TagStatusV1
    {
        Reserved = 0,
        Released = 1,
        Orphan = 2
    }

    public sealed class TagRecordV1
    {
        public string Id { get; set; }               // e.g., "V-0001" or "SYS-0123"
        public string SystemKey { get; set; }        // key into Systems{}
        public string Drawing { get; set; }          // doc.Name at time of allocation
        public string EntityHandle { get; set; }     // hex handle of entity
        public TagStatusV1 Status { get; set; } = TagStatusV1.Reserved;

        public string ReservedBy { get; set; }
        public DateTime? ReservedOn { get; set; }
        public DateTime? ReleasedOn { get; set; }
        public DateTime? OrphanedOn { get; set; }

        public List<TagHistoryV1> History { get; set; } = new List<TagHistoryV1>();
    }

    public sealed class TagHistoryV1
    {
        public DateTime When { get; set; } = DateTime.UtcNow;
        public string Event { get; set; }            // "Allocate", "Orphan", "Release", etc.
        public string By { get; set; }
        public string Note { get; set; }
    }
}
```

## B) `AutoCAD_Shared_Project/ProjectStore/ProjectStoreService.cs`
```csharp
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// File: AutoCAD_Shared_Project/ProjectStore/ProjectStoreService.cs
// Target: C# 7.3
// Desc : Load/Save + Read*/Write*/Peek*/GetSystemNextList helpers for v1.
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.IO;
using System.Linq;
using Newtonsoft.Json;
using V1 = AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.V1;

namespace AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore
{
    public static partial class ProjectStoreService
    {
        // ---------- Persistence ----------
        public static V1.ProjectStoreV1 CreateDefault()
            => new V1.ProjectStoreV1
            {
                Config = new V1.StoreConfigV1 { GlobalValvePrefix = "V", GraceDays = 7, PreferReleasedLowestFirst = true },
                Systems = new Dictionary<string, V1.SystemCounterV1>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
                {
                    ["Default"] = new V1.SystemCounterV1 { Prefix = "L", Pad = 4, Start = 1, End = 9999, Next = 1 }
                }
            };

        public static V1.ProjectStoreV1 Load(string path)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(path) || !File.Exists(path))
                return CreateDefault();
            var json = File.ReadAllText(path);
            var s = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject<V1.ProjectStoreV1>(json) ?? CreateDefault();
            ProjectStoreValidator.EnsureValid(s);
            return s;
        }

        public static void Save(string path, V1.ProjectStoreV1 s)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(path) || s == null) return;
            ProjectStoreValidator.EnsureValid(s);
            var json = JsonConvert.SerializeObject(s, Formatting.Indented);
            File.WriteAllText(path, json);
        }

        // ---------- Config Read ----------
        public static string ReadGlobalValvePrefix(string path) => ReadGlobalValvePrefix(Load(path));
        public static int ReadGraceDays(string path) => ReadGraceDays(Load(path));
        public static bool ReadPreferReleasedLowestFirst(string path) => ReadPreferReleasedLowestFirst(Load(path));

        public static string ReadGlobalValvePrefix(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s) => s?.Config?.GlobalValvePrefix ?? "V";
        public static int ReadGraceDays(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s) => Math.Max(0, s?.Config?.GraceDays ?? 0);
        public static bool ReadPreferReleasedLowestFirst(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s) => s?.Config?.PreferReleasedLowestFirst ?? true;

        // ---------- Config Write ----------
        public static void WriteGlobalValvePrefix(string path, string prefix) { var s = Load(path); WriteGlobalValvePrefix(s, prefix); Save(path, s); }
        public static void WriteGraceDays(string path, int days) { var s = Load(path); WriteGraceDays(s, days); Save(path, s); }
        public static void WritePreferReleasedLowestFirst(string path, bool v) { var s = Load(path); WritePreferReleasedLowestFirst(s, v); Save(path, s); }

        public static void WriteGlobalValvePrefix(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s, string prefix)
        {
            if (s == null) return;
            if (s.Config == null) s.Config = new V1.StoreConfigV1();
            s.Config.GlobalValvePrefix = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(prefix) ? "V" : prefix.Trim();
        }
        public static void WriteGraceDays(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s, int days)
        {
            if (s == null) return;
            if (s.Config == null) s.Config = new V1.StoreConfigV1();
            s.Config.GraceDays = Math.Max(0, days);
        }
        public static void WritePreferReleasedLowestFirst(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s, bool v)
        {
            if (s == null) return;
            if (s.Config == null) s.Config = new V1.StoreConfigV1();
            s.Config.PreferReleasedLowestFirst = v;
        }

        // ---------- System helpers ----------
        public static bool SystemExists(string path, string key) => SystemExists(Load(path), key);
        public static bool SystemExists(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s, string key) => s?.Systems != null && s.Systems.ContainsKey(key ?? "");

        public static string GetFirstSystemName(string path) => GetFirstSystemName(Load(path));
        public static string GetFirstSystemName(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s)
            => (s?.Systems != null && s.Systems.Count > 0) ? s.Systems.Keys.First() : null;

        // DTO shown in palettes
        public sealed class SystemNextInfo
        {
            public string System { get; set; }
            public string Prefix { get; set; }
            public int Next { get; set; }
            public int End { get; set; }
        }

        public static IList<SystemNextInfo> GetSystemNextList(string path) => GetSystemNextList(Load(path));
        public static IList<SystemNextInfo> GetSystemNextList(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s)
        {
            var list = new List<SystemNextInfo>();
            if (s?.Systems == null) return list;

            foreach (var kv in s.Systems)
            {
                var c = kv.Value ?? new V1.SystemCounterV1();
                var next = Math.Max(c.Start, c.Next);
                list.Add(new SystemNextInfo
                {
                    System = kv.Key,
                    Prefix = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(c.Prefix) ? "X" : c.Prefix,
                    Next = next,
                    End = c.End
                });
            }
            return list.OrderBy(x => x.System, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase).ToList();
        }

        // ---------- Peek helpers ----------
        public static string PeekLineTagString(string path, string systemKey = null) => PeekLineTagString(Load(path), systemKey);
        public static string PeekValveTagString(string path, string systemKey = null) => PeekValveTagString(Load(path), systemKey);

        public static string PeekLineTagString(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s, string systemKey = null)
        {
            var sys = ResolveSystem(s, systemKey);
            return sys == null ? string.Empty : FormatId(sys, null, null);
        }

        public static string PeekValveTagString(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s, string systemKey = null)
        {
            var sys = ResolveSystem(s, systemKey);
            if (sys == null) return string.Empty;
            var pfx = ReadGlobalValvePrefix(s);
            return FormatId(sys, pfx, null);
        }

        // ---------- internals ----------
        private static V1.SystemCounterV1 ResolveSystem(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s, string key)
        {
            if (s?.Systems == null || s.Systems.Count == 0) return null;
            V1.SystemCounterV1 exact;
            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(key) && s.Systems.TryGetValue(key, out exact) && exact != null)
                return exact;
            return s.Systems.First().Value ?? new V1.SystemCounterV1 { Prefix = "X", Pad = 4, Start = 1, End = 9999, Next = 1 };
        }

        private static string FormatId(V1.SystemCounterV1 sys, string prefixOverride, int? numberOverride)
        {
            var pad = sys.Pad > 0 ? sys.Pad : 1;
            var n = numberOverride ?? Math.Max(sys.Start, sys.Next);
            var pfx = !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(prefixOverride) ? prefixOverride.Trim()
                     : (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(sys.Prefix) ? sys.Prefix : "X");
            var num = n.ToString().PadLeft(pad, '0');
            return $"{pfx}-{num}";
        }
    }
}
```

## C) `AutoCAD_Shared_Project/ProjectStore/TagStoreV1.cs`
```csharp
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// File: AutoCAD_Shared_Project/ProjectStore/TagStoreV1.cs
// Target: C# 7.3
// Desc : Allocation/Orphan/Release helpers over v1 store
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;
using V1 = AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.V1;

namespace AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore
{
    public static class TagStoreV1
    {
        public static IList<V1.TagRecordV1> GetAll(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s)
            => (IList<V1.TagRecordV1>)(s?.Tags ?? new System.Collections.Generic.List<V1.TagRecordV1>());

        public static V1.TagRecordV1 AllocateNext(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s, string systemKey, string drawing, string entityHandle, string reason, string by)
        {
            if (s == null) throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(s));
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(systemKey)) throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(systemKey));

            V1.SystemCounterV1 sys;
            if (s.Systems == null || !s.Systems.TryGetValue(systemKey, out sys) || sys == null)
                throw new InvalidOperationException($"System '{systemKey}' not found.");

            // Prefer released pool if configured
            var preferReleased = s.Config?.PreferReleasedLowestFirst ?? true;
            if (preferReleased)
            {
                var candidate = s.Tags?
                    .Where(t => t.Status == V1.TagStatusV1.Released && string.Equals(t.SystemKey, systemKey, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
                    .OrderBy(t => ParseNumber(t.Id))
                    .FirstOrDefault();

                if (candidate != null)
                    return ReReserveExisting(candidate, drawing, entityHandle, reason, by);
            }

            // Allocate from system counter
            var n = Math.Max(sys.Start, sys.Next);
            if (n > sys.End) throw new InvalidOperationException($"System '{systemKey}' exhausted (Next>{sys.End}).");

            var id = FormatId(sys, null, n);
            sys.Next = n + 1;

            var rec = new V1.TagRecordV1
            {
                Id = id,
                SystemKey = systemKey,
                Drawing = drawing ?? string.Empty,
                EntityHandle = entityHandle ?? string.Empty,
                Status = V1.TagStatusV1.Reserved,
                ReservedBy = by,
                ReservedOn = DateTime.UtcNow
            };
            rec.History.Add(new V1.TagHistoryV1 { When = DateTime.UtcNow, Event = "Allocate", By = by, Note = reason });
            s.Tags.Add(rec);
            return rec;
        }

        public static void MarkOrphan(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s, string id, string by, string note)
        {
            var rec = FindById(s, id);
            if (rec == null) return;
            rec.Status = V1.TagStatusV1.Orphan;
            rec.OrphanedOn = DateTime.UtcNow;
            rec.History.Add(new V1.TagHistoryV1 { When = DateTime.UtcNow, Event = "Orphan", By = by, Note = note });
        }

        public static bool Release(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s, string id, string note, string by)
        {
            var rec = FindById(s, id);
            if (rec == null) return false;

            // Respect GraceDays
            var grace = Math.Max(0, s.Config?.GraceDays ?? 0);
            if (grace > 0 && rec.OrphanedOn.HasValue)
            {
                if (DateTime.UtcNow < rec.OrphanedOn.Value.AddDays(grace))
                    return false;
            }

            rec.Status = V1.TagStatusV1.Released;
            rec.ReleasedOn = DateTime.UtcNow;
            rec.History.Add(new V1.TagHistoryV1 { When = DateTime.UtcNow, Event = "Release", By = by, Note = note });
            return true;
        }

        // ---------- internals ----------
        private static V1.TagRecordV1 ReReserveExisting(V1.TagRecordV1 rec, string drawing, string handle, string reason, string by)
        {
            rec.Status = V1.TagStatusV1.Reserved;
            rec.Drawing = drawing ?? string.Empty;
            rec.EntityHandle = handle ?? string.Empty;
            rec.ReservedBy = by;
            rec.ReservedOn = DateTime.UtcNow;
            rec.History.Add(new V1.TagHistoryV1 { When = DateTime.UtcNow, Event = "Re-Allocate", By = by, Note = reason });
            return rec;
        }

        private static V1.TagRecordV1 FindById(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s, string id)
            => s?.Tags?.FirstOrDefault(t => string.Equals(t.Id ?? "", id ?? "", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase));

        private static int ParseNumber(string id)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(id)) return int.MaxValue;
            var dash = id.IndexOf('-');
            var num = dash >= 0 && dash + 1 < id.Length ? id.Substring(dash + 1) : id;
            int n; return int.TryParse(num, out n) ? n : int.MaxValue;
        }

        private static string FormatId(V1.SystemCounterV1 sys, string prefixOverride, int? numberOverride)
        {
            var pad = sys.Pad > 0 ? sys.Pad : 1;
            var n = numberOverride ?? Math.Max(sys.Start, sys.Next);
            var pfx = !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(prefixOverride) ? prefixOverride.Trim()
                     : (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(sys.Prefix) ? sys.Prefix : "X");
            return $"{pfx}-{n.ToString().PadLeft(pad, '0')}";
        }
    }
}
```

## D) `AutoCAD_Shared_Project/ProjectStore/StoreGuards.cs`
```csharp
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// File: AutoCAD_Shared_Project/ProjectStore/StoreGuards.cs
// Target: C# 7.3
// Desc : Convenience guard/sweep helpers (e.g., auto-release orphans)
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
using System;
using System.Linq;
using V1 = AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.V1;

namespace AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore
{
    public static class StoreGuards
    {
        public static int AutoReleaseAllEligible(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s, string reason, string by)
        {
            if (s == null || s.Tags == null) return 0;
            var before = s.Tags.Count(t => t.Status == V1.TagStatusV1.Released);

            var grace = Math.Max(0, s.Config?.GraceDays ?? 0);
            var now = DateTime.UtcNow;

            foreach (var t in s.Tags.Where(x => x.Status == V1.TagStatusV1.Orphan))
            {
                if (!t.OrphanedOn.HasValue) continue;
                if (grace == 0 || now >= t.OrphanedOn.Value.AddDays(grace))
                {
                    TagStoreV1.Release(s, t.Id, reason, by);
                }
            }

            var after = s.Tags.Count(t => t.Status == V1.TagStatusV1.Released);
            return after - before;
        }
    }
}
```

## E) `AutoCAD_Shared_Project/ProjectStore/ProjectStoreValidator.cs`
```csharp
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// File: AutoCAD_Shared_Project/ProjectStore/ProjectStoreValidator.cs
// Target: C# 7.3
// Desc : Minimal sanity checks & normalization for v1
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using V1 = AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.V1;

namespace AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore
{
    public static class ProjectStoreValidator
    {
        public static void EnsureValid(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s)
        {
            if (s == null) return;

            s.Version = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(s.Version) ? "1.0" : s.Version;
            if (s.Config == null) s.Config = new V1.StoreConfigV1();
            if (s.Systems == null) s.Systems = new Dictionary<string, V1.SystemCounterV1>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
            if (s.Systems.Count == 0) s.Systems["Default"] = new V1.SystemCounterV1 { Prefix = "L", Pad = 4, Start = 1, End = 9999, Next = 1 };
            if (s.Tags == null) s.Tags = new List<V1.TagRecordV1>();

            foreach (var kv in s.Systems)
            {
                var c = kv.Value ?? (s.Systems[kv.Key] = new V1.SystemCounterV1());
                c.Prefix = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(c.Prefix) ? "X" : c.Prefix;
                if (c.Pad < 1) c.Pad = 1;
                if (c.Start < 1) c.Start = 1;
                if (c.End < c.Start) c.End = c.Start;
                if (c.Next < c.Start) c.Next = c.Start;
            }
        }
    }
}
```

# Zero-drama rescue: make the shared core compile

## 1) Authoritative file manifest (what should EXIST)
Inside **AutoCAD_Shared_Project/ProjectStore/** there should be **only** these files:

- **V1/Models.cs**
- **ProjectStoreService.cs**
- **TagStoreV1.cs**
- **StoreGuards.cs**
- **ProjectStoreValidator.cs**

That’s it. No other files in this folder (or its subfolders) for now.

## 2) What to EXCLUDE/REMOVE (anything causing duplicates)
In **AutoCAD_Shared_Project/ProjectStore/** (and its subfolders), **Exclude From Project** (or delete if you’re comfortable) everything else, especially files with these names/patterns:

- `ProjectStoreService.Models.cs`
- `ProjectStoreService.LegacyCompat.cs`

> **Providing code fixes and instructions**

>
> **Providing code sample**

>

>
