## Response:
11/13/2025, 11:06:20 AM

> **Planning Roslyn analyzer tool**
>
> I’m considering providing a console tool using Roslyn to output JSON mappings for classes, namespaces, and dependencies. I’ll need to ensure it works with MSBuildWorkspace to load the solution, using MSBuildLocator. I’ll focus on a .NET console app, giving clear code examples and a JSON output schema, with additional fallback using PowerShell if needed.
>
> **Planning project setup**
>
> I’ll create a console app using .NET 6 for broader compatibility. The steps will include setting up the project and adding necessary NuGet packages: Microsoft.Build.Locator, Microsoft.CodeAnalysis, and others for Roslyn integration. Additionally, I plan to add System.Text.Json for JSON handling.
>
> Thought for 12s

Yes—this is 100% feasible, and you don’t need VS Enterprise. We can build a tiny **Roslyn** console that crawls your solution, maps classes and their relationships, and emits a single **JSON** file you can paste into any new thread.

Below is a drop-in, minimal-but-solid tool.

# 1) What you get

- **architecture_map.json** that includes:
  - Projects, files, namespaces, types (classes/interfaces/structs).
  - Relationships: **inherits**, **implements**, **uses** (type references found in code).
  - A simple **Tool** tag per file based on folder heuristics (e.g., `Tagging`, `ProjectStore`, `PropertiesHub`, `Valves`, etc.) so a new thread can see blast radius.

# 2) Create the console app

Create a new folder (outside your solution if you want), e.g. `Tools/Cbi.ArchMap`, then add these three files.

### Cbi.ArchMap.csproj
```xml
<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">
  <PropertyGroup>
    <OutputType>Exe</OutputType>
    <TargetFramework>net6.0</TargetFramework>
    <ImplicitUsings>enable</ImplicitUsings>
    <Nullable>enable</Nullable>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.Build.Locator" Version="1.7.6" />
    <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.CodeAnalysis" Version="4.10.0" />
    <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.CSharp.Workspaces" Version="4.10.0" />
    <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.Workspaces.MSBuild" Version="4.10.0" />
    <PackageReference Include="System.Text.Json" Version="8.0.4" />
  </ItemGroup>
</Project>
```

### Models.cs
```csharp
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;

namespace Cbi.ArchMap
{
    public sealed class ArchMap
    {
        public string GeneratedAt { get; set; } = DateTime.UtcNow.ToString("o");
        public string SolutionPath { get; set; } = "";
        public List<ProjectInfo> Projects { get; set; } = new();
        public List<TypeInfo> Types { get; set; } = new();
        public List<Edge> Edges { get; set; } = new();
    }

    public sealed class ProjectInfo
    {
        public string Name { get; set; } = "";
        public string FilePath { get; set; } = "";
        public List<string> Documents { get; set; } = new();
    }

    public sealed class TypeInfo
    {
        public string Id { get; set; } = "";             // Full name: Namespace.Type
        public string Name { get; set; } = "";
        public string Namespace { get; set; } = "";
        public string Kind { get; set; } = "";           // class / interface / struct / enum
        public string Project { get; set; } = "";
        public string FilePath { get; set; } = "";
        public string Tool { get; set; } = "";           // folder-based heuristic
        public List<string> BaseTypes { get; set; } = new();
        public List<string> Interfaces { get; set; } = new();
        public List<string> Methods { get; set; } = new();
        public List<string> Properties { get; set; } = new();
        public List<string> Fields { get; set; } = new();
        public List<string> Usings { get; set; } = new();
        public List<string> UsesTypes { get; set; } = new(); // referenced types in file
    }

    public sealed class Edge
    {
        public string From { get; set; } = ""; // TypeInfo.Id
        public string To { get; set; } = "";   // TypeInfo.Id or external-qualified name
        public string Kind { get; set; } = ""; // inherits | implements | uses
    }
}
```

### Program.cs
```csharp
using System;
using System.IO;
using System.Linq;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Threading.Tasks;
using Microsoft.Build.Locator;
using Microsoft.CodeAnalysis;
using Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.MSBuild;
using Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.CSharp;
using Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.CSharp.Syntax;
using System.Text.Json;
using System.Text.Json.Serialization;

namespace Cbi.ArchMap
{
    internal static class Program
    {
        static async Task<int> Main(string[] args)
        {
            if (args.Length < 1)
            {
                Console.WriteLine("Usage: Cbi.ArchMap <path-to-sln> [output.json]");
                return 2;
            }

            var slnPath = Path.GetFullPath(args[0]);
            var outPath = Path.GetFullPath(args.Length > 1 ? args[1] : "architecture_map.json");

            if (!File.Exists(slnPath))
            {
                Console.Error.WriteLine($"Solution not found: {slnPath}");
                return 3;
            }

            try
            {
                if (!MSBuildLocator.IsRegistered)
                {
                    var vs = MSBuildLocator.QueryVisualStudioInstances().OrderByDescending(v => v.Version).FirstOrDefault();
                    if (vs != null) MSBuildLocator.RegisterInstance(vs);
                    else MSBuildLocator.RegisterDefaults();
                }

                using var ws = MSBuildWorkspace.Create(new Dictionary<string, string?>
                {
                    ["SkipUnrecognizedProjects"] = "true"
                });

                Console.WriteLine($"Opening solution: {slnPath}");
                var solution = await ws.OpenSolutionAsync(slnPath);
                var map = new ArchMap { SolutionPath = slnPath };

                // collect type map for cross-linking
                var allTypes = new Dictionary<string, TypeInfo>(StringComparer.Ordinal);

                foreach (var proj in solution.Projects)
                {
                    var pinfo = new ProjectInfo { Name = proj.Name, FilePath = proj.FilePath ?? "" };
                    map.Projects.Add(pinfo);

                    var docs = proj.Documents.Where(d => d.SourceCodeKind == SourceCodeKind.Regular && d.FilePath != null && d.FilePath.EndsWith(".cs", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)).ToList();
                    pinfo.Documents.AddRange(docs.Select(d => d.FilePath!));

                    foreach (var doc in docs)
                    {
                        var tree = await doc.GetSyntaxTreeAsync();
                        if (tree == null) continue;
                        var root = await tree.GetRootAsync();
                        var model = await doc.GetSemanticModelAsync();
                        if (model == null) continue;

                        var usings = root.DescendantNodes().OfType<UsingDirectiveSyntax>()
                            .Select(u => u.Name.ToString()).Distinct().ToList();

                        foreach (var decl in root.DescendantNodes().OfType<BaseTypeDeclarationSyntax>()) // classes, structs, interfaces, enums
                        {
                            var symbol = model.GetDeclaredSymbol(decl);
                            if (symbol is not INamedTypeSymbol ts) continue;

                            var t = new TypeInfo
                            {
                                Id = ts.ToDisplayString(SymbolDisplayFormat.CSharpErrorMessageFormat),
                                Name = ts.Name,
                                Namespace = ts.ContainingNamespace?.ToDisplayString() ?? "",
                                Kind = ts.TypeKind.ToString().ToLowerInvariant(),
                                Project = proj.Name,
                                FilePath = doc.FilePath!,
                                Tool = GuessTool(doc.FilePath!, proj.Name),
                                Usings = usings
                            };

                            // Bases / interfaces
                            foreach (var bt in ts.BaseTypes())
                                t.BaseTypes.Add(bt.ToDisplayString(SymbolDisplayFormat.CSharpErrorMessageFormat));

                            foreach (var iface in ts.AllInterfaces)
                                t.Interfaces.Add(iface.ToDisplayString(SymbolDisplayFormat.CSharpErrorMessageFormat));

                            // Members
                            foreach (var m in ts.GetMembers().OfType<IMethodSymbol>())
                            {
                                if (m.MethodKind == MethodKind.Constructor || m.MethodKind == MethodKind.Destructor) continue;
                                t.Methods.Add($"{m.DeclaredAccessibility.ToString().ToLower()} {m.ReturnType.ToDisplayString(SymbolDisplayFormat.MinimallyQualifiedFormat)} {m.Name}({string.Join(", ", m.Parameters.Select(p => p.Type.ToDisplayString(SymbolDisplayFormat.MinimallyQualifiedFormat)))})");
                            }
                            foreach (var p in ts.GetMembers().OfType<IPropertySymbol>())
                                t.Properties.Add($"{p.DeclaredAccessibility.ToString().ToLower()} {p.Type.ToDisplayString(SymbolDisplayFormat.MinimallyQualifiedFormat)} {p.Name}");
                            foreach (var f in ts.GetMembers().OfType<IFieldSymbol>())
                                t.Fields.Add($"{f.DeclaredAccessibility.ToString().ToLower()} {f.Type.ToDisplayString(SymbolDisplayFormat.MinimallyQualifiedFormat)} {f.Name}");

                            // Uses: find referenced type identifiers within this declaration span
                            var span = decl.Span;
                            var idents = decl.DescendantNodes().OfType<IdentifierNameSyntax>();
                            var used = new HashSet<string>(StringComparer.Ordinal);
                            foreach (var id in idents)
                            {
                                var info = model.GetSymbolInfo(id).Symbol;
                                if (info is INamedTypeSymbol rtype)
                                    used.Add(rtype.ToDisplayString(SymbolDisplayFormat.CSharpErrorMessageFormat));
                            }
                            t.UsesTypes.AddRange(used.OrderBy(s => s));

                            allTypes[t.Id] = t;
                            map.Types.Add(t);

                            // Edges: inherits / implements
                            foreach (var bt in t.BaseTypes)
                                map.Edges.Add(new Edge { From = t.Id, To = bt, Kind = "inherits" });
                            foreach (var it in t.Interfaces.Distinct())
                                map.Edges.Add(new Edge { From = t.Id, To = it, Kind = "implements" });
                            foreach (var ut in t.UsesTypes)
                                map.Edges.Add(new Edge { From = t.Id, To = ut, Kind = "uses" });
                        }
                    }
                }

                // Serialize
                var json = JsonSerializer.Serialize(map, new JsonSerializerOptions
                {
                    WriteIndented = true,
                    DefaultIgnoreCondition = JsonIgnoreCondition.WhenWritingNull
                });

                await File.WriteAllTextAsync(outPath, json);
                Console.WriteLine($"Wrote: {outPath}");
                return 0;
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                Console.Error.WriteLine(ex.ToString());
                return 1;
            }
        }

        private static IEnumerable<INamedTypeSymbol> BaseTypes(this INamedTypeSymbol type)
        {
            var cur = type.BaseType;
            while (cur != null && cur.SpecialType != SpecialType.System_Object)
            {
                yield return cur;
                cur = cur.BaseType;
            }
        }

        private static string GuessTool(string filePath, string projectName)
        {
            // Heuristic: take the first folder under the project that looks like a tool bucket
            // e.g., AutoCAD2020/Tagging/Services/ValveInsertService.cs => "Tagging"
            try
            {
                var norm = filePath.Replace('\\', '/');
                var idx = norm.IndexOf(projectName + "/", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
                if (idx < 0) return "";
                var tail = norm.Substring(idx + projectName.Length + 1);
                var parts = tail.Split('/');
                if (parts.Length == 0) return "";
                var first = parts[0];

                // Normalize some known buckets
                var known = new HashSet<string>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
                { "Tagging","ProjectStore","PropertiesHub","Valves","Layer_Operations","NOD_X-Data","Debugging","Sheet_Set_Manager" };

                if (known.Contains(first)) return first;
                return first; // fallback to first folder
            }
            catch { return ""; }
        }
    }
}
```

# 3) How to run

From the `Cbi.ArchMap` folder:
```
dotnet restore
dotnet build -c Release
dotnet run -- "C:\Path\To\CBI_Tools.sln" "C:\Path\To\docs\architecture_map.json"
```

Commit `docs/architecture_map.json` to your repo. In a **new thread**, paste the JSON’s **Tools + Types** sections or the whole file (if size allows). I can then see, at a glance, which classes each tool touches and the ripple effects when we modify one.

- Keep a short `docs/Architecture_Snapshot.md` alongside (human-readable index).

## Response:
11/13/2025, 11:10:45 AM

Awesome — here’s a tiny **post-processor** that turns your `architecture_map.json` into a clean, human-readable `Architecture_Snapshot.md`. It’s a separate console so you can run it anytime after regenerating the JSON.

# Cbi.ArchMap.Post (Markdown generator)

## 1) Create a new console

`Tools/Cbi.ArchMap.Post/`

### Cbi.ArchMap.Post.csproj
```xml
<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">
  <PropertyGroup>
    <OutputType>Exe</OutputType>
    <TargetFramework>net6.0</TargetFramework>
    <ImplicitUsings>enable</ImplicitUsings>
    <Nullable>enable</Nullable>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <PackageReference Include="System.Text.Json" Version="8.0.4" />
  </ItemGroup>
</Project>
```

### Models.cs
> Copy this file **verbatim** from your `Cbi.ArchMap` tool (the same `Models.cs` you already have).  
It defines `ArchMap`, `ProjectInfo`, `TypeInfo`, `Edge`.

### Program.cs
```csharp
using System;
using System.IO;
using System.Linq;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Text;
using System.Text.Json;
using System.Text.Json.Serialization;

using Cbi.ArchMap;

internal static class Program
{
    static int Main(string[] args)
    {
        if (args.Length < 1)
        {
            Console.WriteLine("Usage: Cbi.ArchMap.Post <architecture_map.json> [Architecture_Snapshot.md]");
            return 2;
        }

        var jsonPath = Path.GetFullPath(args[0]);
        var mdPath   = Path.GetFullPath(args.Length > 1 ? args[1] : "Architecture_Snapshot.md");

        if (!File.Exists(jsonPath))
        {
            Console.Error.WriteLine($"Input not found: {jsonPath}");
            return 3;
        }

        ArchMap map;
        try
        {
            var json = File.ReadAllText(jsonPath);
            map = JsonSerializer.Deserialize<ArchMap>(json, new JsonSerializerOptions
            {
                PropertyNameCaseInsensitive = true,
                ReadCommentHandling = JsonCommentHandling.Skip
            }) ?? new ArchMap();
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            Console.Error.WriteLine("Failed to read architecture_map.json:");
            Console.Error.WriteLine(ex);
            return 4;
        }

        // Index types by Id
        var typeById = map.Types.ToDictionary(t => t.Id, t => t, StringComparer.Ordinal);

        // Group by Tool
        var byTool = map.Types
            .GroupBy(t => string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(t.Tool) ? "(Uncategorized)" : t.Tool)
            .OrderBy(g => g.Key, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
            .ToList();

        // File counts per tool
        var filesByTool = map.Types
            .GroupBy(t => string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(t.Tool) ? "(Uncategorized)" : t.Tool)
            .ToDictionary(
                g => g.Key,
                g => g.Select(t => t.FilePath).Where(p => !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(p))
                     .Distinct(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase).Count(),
                StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

        // Cross-tool dependencies (uses edges)
        // ToolA -> ToolB (count)
        var edges = map.Edges.Where(e => e.Kind == "uses").ToList();
        var toolOf = new Func<string, string>(id =>
        {
            if (typeById.TryGetValue(id, out var ti))
                return string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(ti.Tool) ? "(Uncategorized)" : ti.Tool;
            return "(External)";
        });

        var cross = new Dictionary<(string FromTool, string ToTool), int>();
        foreach (var e in edges)
        {
            var fromT = toolOf(e.From);
            var toT   = toolOf(e.To);
            var key = (fromT, toT);
            cross[key] = cross.TryGetValue(key, out var c) ? c + 1 : 1;
        }

        // Incoming “uses” count per type (hotspots)
        var incomingUses = new Dictionary<string, int>();
        foreach (var e in edges)
        {
            if (!incomingUses.ContainsKey(e.To)) incomingUses[e.To] = 0;
            incomingUses[e.To]++;
        }

        // External references (edges to types not in map)
        var externalTargets = edges
            .Where(e => !typeById.ContainsKey(e.To))
            .GroupBy(e => e.To)
            .OrderByDescending(g => g.Count())
            .Select(g => (Type: g.Key, Count: g.Count()))
            .ToList();

        // Markdown build
        var sb = new StringBuilder();
        sb.AppendLine("# Architecture Snapshot");
        sb.AppendLine();
        sb.AppendLine($"- **Generated from:** `{Path.GetFileName(jsonPath)}`");
        sb.AppendLine($"- **Solution:** `{map.SolutionPath}`");
        sb.AppendLine($"- **When:** `{map.GeneratedAt}`");
        sb.AppendLine($"- **Projects:** {map.Projects.Count}");
        sb.AppendLine($"- **Types:** {map.Types.Count}");
        sb.AppendLine();

        // Projects
        sb.AppendLine("## Projects");
        foreach (var p in map.Projects.OrderBy(p => p.Name, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
        {
            sb.AppendLine($"- **{p.Name}** — {p.Documents.Count} files");
        }
        sb.AppendLine();

        // Tools summary
        sb.AppendLine("## Tool Summary");
        sb.AppendLine("| Tool | #Types | #Files | Uses Other Tools |");
        sb.AppendLine("|---|---:|---:|---|");

        foreach (var g in byTool)
        {
            var tool = g.Key;
            var typesCount = g.Count();
            var filesCount = filesByTool.TryGetValue(tool, out var fc) ? fc : 0;

            var outgoing = cross
                .Where(kv => kv.Key.FromTool.Equals(tool, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
                .GroupBy(kv => kv.Key.ToTool)
                .OrderByDescending(gg => gg.Sum(x => x.Value))
                .Select(gg => $"{gg.Key} ({gg.Sum(x => x.Value)})")
                .ToList();

            sb.AppendLine($"| {tool} | {typesCount} | {filesCount} | {(outgoing.Count == 0 ? "—" : string.Join(", ", outgoing))} |");
        }
        sb.AppendLine();

        // Cross-tool dependency matrix (compact)
        sb.AppendLine("## Cross-Tool Uses (counts)");
        var allTools = byTool.Select(g => g.Key).Union(new[] { "(External)" }).OrderBy(s => s, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase).ToList();

        // header
        sb.Append("| From \\ To ");
        foreach (var col in allTools) sb.Append($"| {col} ");
        sb.AppendLine("|");
        sb.Append("|---");
        foreach (var _ in allTools) sb.Append("|---:");
        sb.AppendLine("|");

        foreach (var row in allTools)
        {
            sb.Append($"| {row} ");
            foreach (var col in allTools)
            {
                cross.TryGetValue((row, col), out var count);
                sb.Append($"| {count} ");
            }
            sb.AppendLine("|");
        }
        sb.AppendLine();

        // Hotspots
        sb.AppendLine("## Top Referenced Types (incoming `uses`)");
        var topHot = incomingUses
            .OrderByDescending(kv => kv.Value)
            .Take(15)
            .Select(kv => new { Id = kv.Key, Count = kv.Value, Tool = toolOf(kv.Key) })
            .ToList();

        if (topHot.Count == 0)
        {
            sb.AppendLine("_No internal hotspots detected._");
        }
        else
        {
            foreach (var h in topHot)
                sb.AppendLine($"- **{h.Id}** — used by {h.Count} type(s) • Tool: {h.Tool}");
        }
        sb.AppendLine();

        // By Tool: types
        foreach (var g in byTool)
        {
            sb.AppendLine($"## {g.Key}");
            var byNs = g.GroupBy(t => t.Namespace ?? "").OrderBy(x => x.Key, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
            foreach (var ns in byNs)
            {
                sb.AppendLine($"### {ns.Key}");
                foreach (var t in ns.OrderBy(t => t.Name, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
                {
                    sb.AppendLine($"- `{t.Kind}` **{t.Name}**");
                    if (t.BaseTypes.Count > 0) sb.AppendLine($"  - inherits: {string.Join(", ", t.BaseTypes)}");
                    if (t.Interfaces.Count > 0) sb.AppendLine($"  - implements: {string.Join(", ", t.Interfaces)}");
                }
            }
            sb.AppendLine();
        }

        // External refs
        sb.AppendLine("## External Type References");
        if (externalTargets.Count == 0)
        {
            sb.AppendLine("_None_");
        }
        else
        {
            foreach (var ext in externalTargets.Take(25))
                sb.AppendLine($"- {ext.Type} — {ext.Count} use(s)");
            if (externalTargets.Count > 25)
                sb.AppendLine($"_…and {externalTargets.Count - 25} more_");
        }

        try
        {
            File.WriteAllText(mdPath, sb.ToString(), new UTF8Encoding(encoderShouldEmitUTF8Identifier: false));
            Console.WriteLine($"Wrote: {mdPath}");
            return 0;
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            Console.Error.WriteLine("Failed to write Markdown:");
            Console.Error.WriteLine(ex);
            return 5;
        }
    }
}
```

## 2) Run it

After you generate `architecture_map.json` with **Cbi.ArchMap**:

```bash
dotnet run --project Tools/Cbi.ArchMap.Post/Cbi.ArchMap.Post.csproj -- ^
  "C:\Path\To\docs\architecture_map.json" ^
  "C:\Path\To\docs\Architecture_Snapshot.md"
```

It produces:

- A **Projects** list (counts)
- A **Tool Summary** table (types/files/outgoing deps)
- A **Cross-Tool Uses** matrix
- **Top Referenced Types** (hotspots)
- A per-tool **Types listing** (with inherits/implements)
- **External Type References** (things you call that aren’t in your repo)

## 3) Daily workflow

1) Run **Cbi.ArchMap** → updates `architecture_map.json`  
2) Run **Cbi.ArchMap.Post** → updates `Architecture_Snapshot.md`  
3) Commit both into `/docs/`  
4) In any new chat, paste the relevant *tool section* from the markdown (or attach both files). I can immediately see blast radius and dependencies — no guessing.

If you want, I can also add a small switch to the first tool to emit both JSON+MD in one pass.

Creating the console app, sould i just start a new solution or does this need to stay in the Autocad solution? Also sould I make a new project in auticsd and keep only this code there?

## Response:
11/13/2025, 11:14:23 AM

Excellent question — and you’re thinking the right way. 👍  
Here’s the practical answer depending on how you want to use it:

---

## 🔹 **Recommended (Best-Practice) Setup**
> Create a **separate solution** just for development utilities.  
> Example folder:
```
E:\Development\CBI\Tools\
│
├── Cbi.ArchMap\
│   ├── Cbi.ArchMap.csproj
│   └── (source files)
│
├── Cbi.ArchMap.Post\
│   ├── Cbi.ArchMap.Post.csproj
│   └── (source files)
│
└── CBI_Tools_Analyzer.sln   ← new solution just for these two projects
```

### Why separate?
✅ Keeps your **AutoCAD solution clean** — no Roslyn or workspace DLLs mixed in.  
✅ No risk of accidentally referencing your main projects (and breaking builds).  
✅ Easier to update/ship the analyzer independently (even run from a batch file).  
✅ You can reuse this later for your PSBA or other codebases.

You’ll run the analyzer **outside** your AutoCAD solution like this:

```bash
dotnet run --project E:\Development\CBI\Tools\Cbi.ArchMap\Cbi.ArchMap.csproj ^
  "E:\Development\Company\CBI\AutoCAD2020\CBI_Tools.sln" ^
  "E:\Development\Company\CBI\docs\architecture_map.json"

dotnet run --project E:\Development\CBI\Tools\Cbi.ArchMap.Post\Cbi.ArchMap.Post.csproj ^
  "E:\Development\Company\CBI\docs\architecture_map.json" ^
  "E:\Development\Company\CBI\docs\Architecture_Snapshot.md"
```

---

## 🔸 **Alternative (Quick & Dirty)**
If you want to **bundle everything** together temporarily:

- Add a **new folder in your existing AutoCAD solution**, e.g.  
  `AutoCAD2020\Tools\Cbi.ArchMap\`
- Add a **new Console App project** (`.NET 6.0`) called `Cbi.ArchMap`
- Add the code there
- **Do NOT** reference your AutoCAD projects; the analyzer just reads the `.sln` file and doesn’t compile your code.

It will work fine — it’s just slightly messier in Solution Explorer.

---

## 🔹 Summary Decision Flow

| Situation | Recommended Action |
|------------|-------------------|
| You want a permanent analyzer suite for CBI and PSBA | ✅ Make a separate **Tools solution** (`CBI_Tools_Analyzer.sln`) |
| You just want to test it once | Add it as a **standalone console project** to your current solution |
| You’re on a shared company repo (Avatara environment) | Definitely keep it **outside AutoCAD solution** to avoid company build conflicts |

---

Once you’re set up, I can add a small **batch file** (`Generate_ArchitectureMap.bat`) that runs both analyzers sequentially and writes the timestamped output into your `docs/` folder — one click to regenerate everything.

Would you like me to write that batch file next?

## Response:
11/13/2025, 11:19:24 AM

> **Confirming approach and next steps**
>
> I think the user is on the right track! It's a good idea to separate the solution into two projects, Cbi.ArchMap and Cbi.ArchMap.Post. The minimal Program.cs will definitely help, and I should reassure them about this step-by-step breakdown. I’ll provide the basic project scaffolding and clarify these next steps.
>
> Thought for 7s

You’re absolutely going about this the right way. A small, **separate “support tools” solution** that scans your main solution and emits a machine-readable map (JSON) is exactly how teams keep architectural truth outside of any single chat/thread. It gives us a stable artifact we can load in any future thread and instantly “know” how your tools hang together.

Here’s a minimal, working MVP you can stand up now. It’s intentionally small but solid—then we’ll layer on richer relations (calls, XRef graphs, etc.) once this is running.

# 1) Solution layout

```
E:\Development\CBI\Tools\
├─ Cbi.ArchMap\                   # analyzer -> emits JSON
│  └─ Cbi.ArchMap.csproj
├─ Cbi.ArchMap.Post\              # post-processor -> JSON -> Markdown
│  └─ Cbi.ArchMap.Post.csproj
└─ CBI_Tools_Analyzer.sln
```

# 2) Project: Cbi.ArchMap (Console app)

## Cbi.ArchMap.csproj
```xml
<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">
  <PropertyGroup>
    <OutputType>Exe</OutputType>
    <TargetFramework>net8.0</TargetFramework>
    <Nullable>enable</Nullable>
    <ImplicitUsings>enable</ImplicitUsings>
  </PropertyGroup>

  <ItemGroup>
    <!-- Loads VS solutions/projects -->
    <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.Build.Locator" Version="1.6.10" />
    <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.Workspaces.MSBuild" Version="4.10.0" />
    <!-- JSON output -->
    <PackageReference Include="Newtonsoft.Json" Version="13.0.3" />
  </ItemGroup>
</Project>
```

## Program.cs (MVP)
```csharp
using System;
using System.IO;
using System.Linq;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using Microsoft.Build.Locator;
using Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.MSBuild;
using Microsoft.CodeAnalysis;
using Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.CSharp;
using Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.CSharp.Syntax;
using Newtonsoft.Json;

internal static class Program
{
    private sealed class ArchMap
    {
        public string SolutionPath { get; set; } = "";
        public DateTime GeneratedUtc { get; set; } = DateTime.UtcNow;
        public List<ProjectInfoItem> Projects { get; set; } = new();
    }

    private sealed class ProjectInfoItem
    {
        public string Name { get; set; } = "";
        public string? FilePath { get; set; }
        public string Language { get; set; } = "C#";
        public List<DocumentInfoItem> Documents { get; set; } = new();
        public List<string> ProjectReferences { get; set; } = new();
    }

    private sealed class DocumentInfoItem
    {
        public string Name { get; set; } = "";
        public string? FilePath { get; set; }
        public List<TypeInfoItem> Types { get; set; } = new();
    }

    private sealed class TypeInfoItem
    {
        public string Kind { get; set; } = "";                 // class/struct/interface/enum
        public string Name { get; set; } = "";
        public string? Namespace { get; set; }
        public string? BaseType { get; set; }                   // simple string for MVP
        public List<string> Interfaces { get; set; } = new();
        public List<string> Methods { get; set; } = new();      // signatures (simplified)
        public List<string> Fields { get; set; } = new();
        public List<string> Properties { get; set; } = new();
    }

    public static async System.Threading.Tasks.Task Main(string[] args)
    {
        if (args.Length < 2)
        {
            Console.WriteLine("Usage: Cbi.ArchMap <path-to-sln> <path-to-output-json>");
            return;
        }

        var slnPath = Path.GetFullPath(args[0]);
        var outPath = Path.GetFullPath(args[1]);

        if (!File.Exists(slnPath))
        {
            Console.Error.WriteLine($"Solution not found: {slnPath}");
            return;
        }

        // Make sure MSBuild is registered for whatever VS is installed.
        if (!MSBuildLocator.IsRegistered) MSBuildLocator.RegisterDefaults();

        using var workspace = MSBuildWorkspace.Create();
        workspace.WorkspaceFailed += (_, e) =>
        {
            // Non-fatal project load messages show up here
            Console.WriteLine($"[Workspace] {e.Diagnostic.Kind}: {e.Diagnostic.Message}");
        };

        Console.WriteLine($"Loading solution: {slnPath}");
        var solution = await workspace.OpenSolutionAsync(slnPath);
        var arch = new ArchMap { SolutionPath = slnPath, GeneratedUtc = DateTime.UtcNow };

        foreach (var project in solution.Projects
                     .Where(p => p.Language == LanguageNames.CSharp)
                     .OrderBy(p => p.Name))
        {
            var pItem = new ProjectInfoItem
            {
                Name = project.Name,
                FilePath = project.FilePath,
                Language = project.Language
            };

            // Project references (by name if available)
            foreach (var pref in project.ProjectReferences)
            {
                var prj = solution.GetProject(pref.ProjectId);
                if (prj != null) pItem.ProjectReferences.Add(prj.Name);
            }

            foreach (var doc in project.Documents.Where(d => d.SourceCodeKind == SourceCodeKind.Regular))
            {
                var dItem = new DocumentInfoItem { Name = doc.Name, FilePath = doc.FilePath };
                var root = await doc.GetSyntaxRootAsync().ConfigureAwait(false);
                var model = await doc.GetSemanticModelAsync().ConfigureAwait(false);
                if (root == null || model == null) { pItem.Documents.Add(dItem); continue; }

                // Walk top-level type declarations (classes/interfaces/structs/enums)
                foreach (var node in root.DescendantNodes().OfType<TypeDeclarationSyntax>())
                {
                    var symbol = model.GetDeclaredSymbol(node) as INamedTypeSymbol;
                    var tItem = new TypeInfoItem
                    {
                        Kind = node.Keyword.ValueText, // "class", "struct", "interface", "record"
                        Name = symbol?.Name ?? node.Identifier.Text,
                        Namespace = symbol?.ContainingNamespace?.ToDisplayString()
                    };

                    if (symbol?.BaseType != null && symbol.BaseType.SpecialType != SpecialType.System_Object)
                        tItem.BaseType = symbol.BaseType.ToDisplayString();

                    foreach (var itf in symbol?.Interfaces ?? Array.Empty<INamedTypeSymbol>())
                        tItem.Interfaces.Add(itf.ToDisplayString());

                    // Methods (public/protected/internal/private) – signatures simplified
                    foreach (var m in node.Members.OfType<MethodDeclarationSyntax>())
                    {
                        var sig = $"{m.Modifiers} {m.ReturnType} {m.Identifier}({string.Join(", ", m.ParameterList.Parameters.Select(p => p.Type?.ToString() ?? "var"))})";
                        tItem.Methods.Add(Normalize(sig));
                    }

                    // Fields
                    foreach (var f in node.Members.OfType<FieldDeclarationSyntax>())
                    {
                        var typeStr = f.Declaration.Type.ToString();
                        foreach (var v in f.Declaration.Variables)
                            tItem.Fields.Add($"{string.Join(" ", f.Modifiers.Select(m => m.ValueText))} {typeStr} {v.Identifier}");
                    }

                    // Properties
                    foreach (var p in node.Members.OfType<PropertyDeclarationSyntax>())
                    {
                        var propSig = $"{string.Join(" ", p.Modifiers.Select(m => m.ValueText))} {p.Type} {p.Identifier}";
                        tItem.Properties.Add(Normalize(propSig));
                    }

                    dItem.Types.Add(tItem);
                }

                pItem.Documents.Add(dItem);
            }

            arch.Projects.Add(pItem);
        }

        Directory.CreateDirectory(Path.GetDirectoryName(outPath)!);
        File.WriteAllText(outPath, JsonConvert.SerializeObject(arch, Formatting.Indented));
        Console.WriteLine($"Wrote: {outPath}");
    }

    private static string Normalize(string s)
        => string.Join(" ", (s ?? "").Split(new[] { ' ', '\t', '\r', '\n' }, StringSplitOptions.RemoveEmptyEntries));
}
```

This MVP gives us:

- Projects (and their project-to-project references)
- For each document: all types (class/struct/interface/record)
- For each type: base type, interfaces, methods, fields, properties

That’s already enough for a **clear “what touches what”** conversation next time.

# 3) Project: Cbi.ArchMap.Post (Console app)

Converts the JSON to a human-friendly Markdown overview you can paste into Obsidian or attach to a new thread so I can ingest it quickly.

## Cbi.ArchMap.Post.csproj
```xml
<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">
  <PropertyGroup>
    <OutputType>Exe</OutputType>
    <TargetFramework>net8.0</TargetFramework>
    <Nullable>enable</Nullable>
  </PropertyGroup>

  <ItemGroup>
    <PackageReference Include="Newtonsoft.Json" Version="13.0.3" />
  </ItemGroup>
</Project>
```

## Program.cs (Post)
```csharp
using System;
using System.IO;
using System.Linq;
using System.Text;
using Newtonsoft.Json;

public class ArchMap { public string SolutionPath=""; public DateTime GeneratedUtc; public ProjectInfoItem[] Projects = Array.Empty<ProjectInfoItem>(); }
public class ProjectInfoItem { public string Name=""; public string? FilePath; public string Language="C#"; public DocumentInfoItem[] Documents=Array.Empty<DocumentInfoItem>(); public string[] ProjectReferences=Array.Empty<string>(); }
public class DocumentInfoItem { public string Name=""; public string? FilePath; public TypeInfoItem[] Types=Array.Empty<TypeInfoItem>(); }
public class TypeInfoItem { public string Kind=""; public string Name=""; public string? Namespace; public string? BaseType; public string[] Interfaces=Array.Empty<string>(); public string[] Methods=Array.Empty<string>(); public string[] Fields=Array.Empty<string>(); public string[] Properties=Array.Empty<string>(); }

internal static class Program
{
    public static void Main(string[] args)
    {
        if (args.Length < 2)
        {
            Console.WriteLine("Usage: Cbi.ArchMap.Post <input-json> <output-md>");
            return;
        }

        var jsonPath = Path.GetFullPath(args[0]);
        var mdPath = Path.GetFullPath(args[1]);
        var map = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject<ArchMap>(File.ReadAllText(jsonPath))!;

        var sb = new StringBuilder();
        sb.AppendLine($"# Architecture Snapshot");
        sb.AppendLine();
        sb.AppendLine($"- **Solution:** `{map.SolutionPath}`");
        sb.AppendLine($"- **Generated (UTC):** {map.GeneratedUtc:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss}");
        sb.AppendLine($"- **Projects:** {map.Projects.Length}");
        sb.AppendLine();

        foreach (var p in map.Projects.OrderBy(p => p.Name))
        {
            sb.AppendLine($"## {p.Name}");
            if (p.ProjectReferences.Length > 0)
                sb.AppendLine($"_References:_ {string.Join(", ", p.ProjectReferences)}");
            sb.AppendLine();

            var types = p.Documents.SelectMany(d => d.Types).ToArray();
            var byNs = types.GroupBy(t => t.Namespace ?? "(global)").OrderBy(g => g.Key);

            foreach (var ns in byNs)
            {
                sb.AppendLine($"### Namespace: `{ns.Key}`");
                foreach (var t in ns.OrderBy(t => t.Name))
                {
                    sb.Append($"- **{t.Kind} {t.Name}**");
                    if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(t.BaseType)) sb.Append($" : _{t.BaseType}_");
                    if (t.Interfaces.Length > 0) sb.Append($" implements {string.Join(", ", t.Interfaces.Select(i => $"`{i}`"))}");
                    sb.AppendLine();

                    if (t.Properties.Length > 0)
                        sb.AppendLine($"  - Props: {string.Join("; ", t.Properties.Select(x => $"`{x}`"))}");
                    if (t.Fields.Length > 0)
                        sb.AppendLine($"  - Fields: {string.Join("; ", t.Fields.Select(x => $"`{x}`"))}");
                    if (t.Methods.Length > 0)
                        sb.AppendLine($"  - Methods: {string.Join("; ", t.Methods.Take(8).Select(x => $"`{x}`"))}{(t.Methods.Length>8?" …": "")}");
                }
                sb.AppendLine();
            }
        }

        Directory.CreateDirectory(Path.GetDirectoryName(mdPath)!);
        File.WriteAllText(mdPath, sb.ToString(), Encoding.UTF8);
        Console.WriteLine($"Wrote: {mdPath}");
    }
}
```

# 4) One-click runner (optional)

Create `Generate_ArchitectureMap.bat` next to the solution:

```bat
@echo off
setlocal
set TOOLS=E:\Development\CBI\Tools
set SLN=E:\Development\Company\CBI\AutoCAD2020\CBI_Tools.sln
set OUTJSON=E:\Development\Company\CBI\docs\architecture_map.json
set OUTMD=E:\Development\Company\CBI\docs\Architecture_Snapshot.md

dotnet run --project "%TOOLS%\Cbi.ArchMap\Cbi.ArchMap.csproj" "%SLN%" "%OUTJSON%"
if errorlevel 1 goto :eof

dotnet run --project "%TOOLS%\Cbi.ArchMap.Post\Cbi.ArchMap.Post.csproj" "%OUTJSON%" "%OUTMD%"
endlocal
```

---

## Why this is the “best way” for us

- **Stable artifact** (JSON) that any new thread can read in seconds and get the whole picture.
- **Non-invasive**: doesn’t compile/execute your AutoCAD code; just reads the solution/trees.
- **Grows with you**: we can incrementally add edges like “class A calls class B”, “uses type X from shared project”, “commands → handlers,” etc., without touching your main repo.

If you like, next pass I’ll add:
- “**Command registry**” extraction (scan `[CommandMethod]` attributes and map to handlers)
- A **project dependency graph** edge list in the JSON
- Optional **call-site sniffing** (lightweight: constructor injections, member access across symbols)

But first: get the MVP compiling and producing the JSON/Markdown. Once you have those two files, share the **Markdown** with me and I can “load” your architecture at a glance and keep us on the rails in any thread.

11/13/2025, 12:27:59 PM

I have a seperate thread i made called Higher level coding guidance. It is so I can ask bigger picture questions instead of cluttering this thread. Your suggestion on the format is this. Would you mind revising your new code solution to adopt this?

// ===============================================================
// File: ArchitectureIndexDto.cs
// Author: Brian Ranstead
// Created: 2025-11-13
// Version: 1.0.0
// Description: DTOs for Class Graph "Architecture_Index.json" (schema v1.0)
// Target: C# 7.3, .NET Framework 4.8, Newtonsoft.Json
// ===============================================================

using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using Newtonsoft.Json;

namespace CBI.ArchitectureMap.Dto
{
    public sealed class ArchitectureIndex
    {
        [JsonProperty("schemaVersion")]
        public string SchemaVersion { get; set; } = "1.0";

        [JsonProperty("solution")]
        public SolutionInfo Solution { get; set; }

        [JsonProperty("projects")]
        public List<ProjectInfo> Projects { get; set; } = new List<ProjectInfo>();
    }

    public sealed class SolutionInfo
    {
        [JsonProperty("name")] public string Name { get; set; }
        [JsonProperty("path")] public string Path { get; set; }
        [JsonProperty("git")] public GitInfo Git { get; set; }
        [JsonProperty("generatedAt")] public string GeneratedAt { get; set; } // ISO-8601
        [JsonProperty("generator")] public GeneratorInfo Generator { get; set; }
    }

    public sealed class GitInfo
    {
        [JsonProperty("branch")] public string Branch { get; set; }
        [JsonProperty("commit")] public string Commit { get; set; }
        [JsonProperty("dirty")] public bool Dirty { get; set; }
    }

    public sealed class GeneratorInfo
    {
        [JsonProperty("name")] public string Name { get; set; }
        [JsonProperty("version")] public string Version { get; set; }
    }

    public sealed class ProjectInfo
    {
        [JsonProperty("id")] public string Id { get; set; }
        [JsonProperty("name")] public string Name { get; set; }
        [JsonProperty("assemblyName")] public string AssemblyName { get; set; }
        [JsonProperty("path")] public string Path { get; set; }

        [JsonProperty("targetFramework")] public string TargetFramework { get; set; }
        [JsonProperty("langVersion")] public string LangVersion { get; set; }

        [JsonProperty("references")] public List<string> References { get; set; } = new List<string>();
        [JsonProperty("files")] public List<string> Files { get; set; } = new List<string>();
        [JsonProperty("namespaces")] public List<string> Namespaces { get; set; } = new List<string>();

        [JsonProperty("types")] public List<TypeInfo> Types { get; set; } = new List<TypeInfo>();
        [JsonProperty("edges")] public List<Edge> Edges { get; set; } = new List<Edge>();
    }

    public sealed class TypeInfo
    {
        // Fully-qualified unique id, e.g., "AutoCAD2020.Drawing_Operations.DrawingManager"
        [JsonProperty("id")] public string Id { get; set; }

        [JsonProperty("projectId")] public string ProjectId { get; set; }
        [JsonProperty("name")] public string Name { get; set; }
        [JsonProperty("namespace")] public string Namespace { get; set; }

        // class / struct / interface / enum
        [JsonProperty("kind")] public string Kind { get; set; }

        [JsonProperty("accessibility")] public string Accessibility { get; set; } // public/internal/protected/private
        [JsonProperty("modifiers")] public List<string> Modifiers { get; set; } = new List<string>(); // abstract/sealed/static/partial
        [JsonProperty("partial")] public bool Partial { get; set; }

        [JsonProperty("baseType")] public string BaseType { get; set; } // may be null
        [JsonProperty("implements")] public List<string> Implements { get; set; } = new List<string>();
        [JsonProperty("attributes")] public List<string> Attributes { get; set; } = new List<string>();

        [JsonProperty("documentation")] public Documentation Documentation { get; set; }
        [JsonProperty("header")] public FileHeader Header { get; set; }

        [JsonProperty("source")] public SourceLocation Source { get; set; }
        [JsonProperty("hashes")] public TypeHashes Hashes { get; set; }

        [JsonProperty("members")] public Members Members { get; set; } = new Members();

        [JsonProperty("relationships")] public List<Relationship> Relationships { get; set; } = new List<Relationship>();
        [JsonProperty("referencedBy")] public List<string> ReferencedBy { get; set; } = new List<string>();
    }

    public sealed class Documentation
    {
        [JsonProperty("summary")] public string Summary { get; set; }
        [JsonProperty("remarks")] public string Remarks { get; set; }
    }

    public sealed class FileHeader
    {
        [JsonProperty("version")] public string Version { get; set; } // "1.2.3"
        [JsonProperty("author")] public string Author { get; set; }
        [JsonProperty("created")] public string Created { get; set; } // "YYYY-MM-DD"
        [JsonProperty("since")] public string Since { get; set; } // first version containing this type
    }

    public sealed class SourceLocation
    {
        [JsonProperty("file")] public string File { get; set; }
        [JsonProperty("span")] public TextSpan Span { get; set; }
    }

    public sealed class TextSpan
    {
        [JsonProperty("startLine")] public int StartLine { get; set; }
        [JsonProperty("startCol")] public int StartCol { get; set; }
        [JsonProperty("endLine")] public int EndLine { get; set; }
        [JsonProperty("endCol")] public int EndCol { get; set; }
    }

    public sealed class TypeHashes
    {
        [JsonProperty("publicApiHash")] public string PublicApiHash { get; set; } // signatures only
        [JsonProperty("fullTypeHash")] public string FullTypeHash { get; set; }   // includes bodies
    }

    public sealed class Members
    {
        [JsonProperty("constructors")] public List<MethodInfo> Constructors { get; set; } = new List<MethodInfo>();
        [JsonProperty("methods")] public List<MethodInfo> Methods { get; set; } = new List<MethodInfo>();
        [JsonProperty("properties")] public List<PropertyInfo> Properties { get; set; } = new List<PropertyInfo>();
        [JsonProperty("fields")] public List<FieldInfo> Fields { get; set; } = new List<FieldInfo>();
        [JsonProperty("events")] public List<EventInfo> Events { get; set; } = new List<EventInfo>();
    }

    public sealed class MethodInfo
    {
        [JsonProperty("id")] public string Id { get; set; } // fully-qualified signature id
        [JsonProperty("name")] public string Name { get; set; }
        [JsonProperty("returnType")] public string ReturnType { get; set; }
        [JsonProperty("accessibility")] public string Accessibility { get; set; }
        [JsonProperty("modifiers")] public List<string> Modifiers { get; set; } = new List<string>();
        [JsonProperty("parameters")] public List<ParameterInfo> Parameters { get; set; } = new List<ParameterInfo>();
        [JsonProperty("calls")] public List<string> Calls { get; set; } = new List<string>(); // target method ids
        [JsonProperty("reads")] public List<string> Reads { get; set; } = new List<string>(); // field/property ids
        [JsonProperty("writes")] public List<string> Writes { get; set; } = new List<string>(); // field/property ids
    }

    public sealed class PropertyInfo
    {
        [JsonProperty("id")] public string Id { get; set; }
        [JsonProperty("name")] public string Name { get; set; }
        [JsonProperty("type")] public string Type { get; set; }
        [JsonProperty("accessibility")] public string Accessibility { get; set; }
        [JsonProperty("hasGetter")] public bool HasGetter { get; set; }
        [JsonProperty("hasSetter")] public bool HasSetter { get; set; }
    }

    public sealed class FieldInfo
    {
        [JsonProperty("id")] public string Id { get; set; }
        [JsonProperty("name")] public string Name { get; set; }
        [JsonProperty("type")] public string Type { get; set; }
        [JsonProperty("accessibility")] public string Accessibility { get; set; }
        [JsonProperty("modifiers")] public List<string> Modifiers { get; set; } = new List<string>();
    }

    public sealed class EventInfo
    {
        [JsonProperty("id")] public string Id { get; set; }
        [JsonProperty("name")] public string Name { get; set; }
        [JsonProperty("handlerType")] public string HandlerType { get; set; }
        [JsonProperty("accessibility")] public string Accessibility { get; set; }
    }

    public sealed class ParameterInfo
    {
        [JsonProperty("name")] public string Name { get; set; }
        [JsonProperty("type")] public string Type { get; set; }
    }

    public sealed class Relationship
    {
        // uses / calls / inherits / implements / contains / references
        [JsonProperty("kind")] public string Kind { get; set; }
        [JsonProperty("targetId")] public string TargetId { get; set; }
        [JsonProperty("via")] public string Via { get; set; } // optional explanation (e.g., memberCall/field/ctor)
    }

    public sealed class Edge
    {
        [JsonProperty("sourceId")] public string SourceId { get; set; }
        [JsonProperty("targetId")] public string TargetId { get; set; }
        [JsonProperty("kind")] public string Kind { get; set; }
    }

    // -------------- Helpers for version bump reasoning ----------------

    public enum VersionBump
    {
        None = 0,
        Patch = 1,
        Minor = 2,
        Major = 3
    }

    public static class VersioningAdvisor
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Compares previous and current type hashes and suggests a bump level.
        /// - publicApiHash change => Minor (or Major if breaking; caller decides)
        /// - fullTypeHash change only => Patch
        /// - no change => None
        /// </summary>
        public static VersionBump SuggestBump(TypeHashes previous, TypeHashes current)
        {
            if (previous == null || current == null) return VersionBump.None;

            var apiChanged = !StringEquals(previous.PublicApiHash, current.PublicApiHash);
            var implChanged = !StringEquals(previous.FullTypeHash, current.FullTypeHash);

            if (apiChanged) return VersionBump.Minor; // escalate to Major if you detect breaks upstream
            if (implChanged) return VersionBump.Patch;
            return VersionBump.None;
        }

        private static bool StringEquals(string a, string b)
        {
            return string.Equals(a ?? string.Empty, b ?? string.Empty, StringComparison.Ordinal);
        }
    }
}

# Cbi.ArchMap (console app)

## `Cbi.ArchMap.csproj`
```xml
<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">
  <PropertyGroup>
    <OutputType>Exe</OutputType>
    <TargetFramework>net8.0</TargetFramework>
    <Nullable>enable</Nullable>
    <ImplicitUsings>enable</ImplicitUsings>
  </PropertyGroup>

  <ItemGroup>
    <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.Build.Locator" Version="1.6.10" />
    <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.Workspaces.MSBuild" Version="4.10.0" />
    <PackageReference Include="Newtonsoft.Json" Version="13.0.3" />
  </ItemGroup>
</Project>
```

## `ArchitectureIndexDto.cs`
(use exactly what you pasted — no edits needed)

## `Program.cs`
```csharp
using System;
using System.IO;
using System.Linq;
using System.Text;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Security.Cryptography;
using Microsoft.Build.Locator;
using Microsoft.CodeAnalysis;
using Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.MSBuild;
using Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.CSharp;
using Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.CSharp.Syntax;
using Newtonsoft.Json;
using CBI.ArchitectureMap.Dto;

internal static class Program
{
    public static async System.Threading.Tasks.Task Main(string[] args)
    {
        if (args.Length < 2)
        {
            Console.WriteLine("Usage: Cbi.ArchMap <path-to.sln> <output-Architecture_Index.json>");
            return;
        }

        var slnPath = Path.GetFullPath(args[0]);
        var outJson = Path.GetFullPath(args[1]);

        if (!File.Exists(slnPath))
        {
            Console.Error.WriteLine($"Solution not found: {slnPath}");
            return;
        }

        if (!MSBuildLocator.IsRegistered) MSBuildLocator.RegisterDefaults();

        using var ws = MSBuildWorkspace.Create();
        ws.WorkspaceFailed += (_, e) => Console.WriteLine($"[Workspace] {e.Diagnostic.Kind}: {e.Diagnostic.Message}");

        Console.WriteLine($"Loading solution: {slnPath}");
        var solution = await ws.OpenSolutionAsync(slnPath);

        var arch = new ArchitectureIndex
        {
            SchemaVersion = "1.0",
            Solution = new SolutionInfo
            {
                Name = Path.GetFileNameWithoutExtension(slnPath),
                Path = slnPath,
                GeneratedAt = DateTime.UtcNow.ToString("o"),
                Generator = new GeneratorInfo { Name = "Cbi.ArchMap", Version = "1.0.0" },
                Git = GitProbe.TryProbe(Path.GetDirectoryName(slnPath)!)
            }
        };

        // Projects (C# only)
        foreach (var project in solution.Projects.Where(p => p.Language == LanguageNames.CSharp).OrderBy(p => p.Name))
        {
            var p = new ProjectInfo
            {
                Id = project.Id.Id.ToString(),
                Name = project.Name,
                AssemblyName = project.AssemblyName ?? project.Name,
                Path = project.FilePath ?? "",
                TargetFramework = project.ParseOptions is CSharpParseOptions cpo ? cpo.LanguageVersion.ToDisplayString() : (project.ParseOptions?.Language ?? "C#"),
                LangVersion = (project.ParseOptions as CSharpParseOptions)?.LanguageVersion.ToDisplayString() ?? "default"
            };

            // project refs
            foreach (var pr in project.ProjectReferences)
            {
                var refProj = solution.GetProject(pr.ProjectId);
                if (refProj != null) p.References.Add(refProj.Name);
            }

            // documents
            foreach (var doc in project.Documents.Where(d => d.SourceCodeKind == SourceCodeKind.Regular))
            {
                if (doc.FilePath != null) p.Files.Add(doc.FilePath);

                var root = await doc.GetSyntaxRootAsync().ConfigureAwait(false);
                var model = await doc.GetSemanticModelAsync().ConfigureAwait(false);
                if (root == null || model == null) continue;

                // namespaces
                foreach (var ns in root.DescendantNodes().OfType<NamespaceDeclarationSyntax>())
                    p.Namespaces.Add(ns.Name.ToString());
                foreach (var fns in root.DescendantNodes().OfType<FileScopedNamespaceDeclarationSyntax>())
                    p.Namespaces.Add(fns.Name.ToString());

                // types
                var types = root.DescendantNodes().OfType<TypeDeclarationSyntax>().ToList();
                foreach (var td in types)
                {
                    var sym = model.GetDeclaredSymbol(td) as INamedTypeSymbol;
                    var fqName = sym?.ToDisplayString(SymbolDisplayFormat.FullyQualifiedFormat)
                                  ?? $"{(td.Parent as NamespaceDeclarationSyntax)?.Name}.{td.Identifier.Text}";
                    fqName = fqName?.Replace("global::", "");

                    var t = new TypeInfo
                    {
                        Id = fqName ?? td.Identifier.Text,
                        ProjectId = p.Id,
                        Name = sym?.Name ?? td.Identifier.Text,
                        Namespace = sym?.ContainingNamespace?.ToDisplayString() ?? "",
                        Kind = td.Keyword.ValueText,
                        Accessibility = (sym?.DeclaredAccessibility.ToString() ?? "NotApplicable"),
                        Partial = td.Modifiers.Any(m => m.IsKind(SyntaxKind.PartialKeyword)),
                        Modifiers = td.Modifiers.Select(m => m.ValueText).Where(s => s != "partial").ToList(),
                        BaseType = (sym?.BaseType != null && sym.BaseType.SpecialType != SpecialType.System_Object) ? sym.BaseType.ToDisplayString() : null,
                        Implements = (sym?.Interfaces ?? Array.Empty<INamedTypeSymbol>()).Select(i => i.ToDisplayString()).ToList(),
                        Attributes = (sym?.GetAttributes() ?? Array.Empty<AttributeData>()).Select(a => a.AttributeClass?.ToDisplayString() ?? "").Where(s => !string.IsNullOrEmpty(s)).ToList(),
                        Documentation = new Documentation { Summary = TryGetXmlSummary(sym), Remarks = "" },
                        Header = FileHeaderParser.TryParse(doc),
                        Source = MakeSourceLocation(td),
                    };

                    // Members
                    var mb = new Members();
                    // ctors
                    foreach (var c in td.Members.OfType<ConstructorDeclarationSyntax>())
                    {
                        var csym = model.GetDeclaredSymbol(c) as IMethodSymbol;
                        mb.Constructors.Add(new MethodInfo
                        {
                            Id = MethodId(t.Id, csym),
                            Name = c.Identifier.ValueText,
                            ReturnType = "void",
                            Accessibility = csym?.DeclaredAccessibility.ToString() ?? "",
                            Modifiers = c.Modifiers.Select(m => m.ValueText).ToList(),
                            Parameters = csym?.Parameters.Select(Param).ToList() ?? new List<ParameterInfo>(),
                            Calls = new List<string>(),
                            Reads = new List<string>(),
                            Writes = new List<string>()
                        });
                    }
                    // methods
                    foreach (var m in td.Members.OfType<MethodDeclarationSyntax>())
                    {
                        var msym = model.GetDeclaredSymbol(m) as IMethodSymbol;
                        mb.Methods.Add(new MethodInfo
                        {
                            Id = MethodId(t.Id, msym),
                            Name = m.Identifier.ValueText,
                            ReturnType = msym?.ReturnType?.ToDisplayString() ?? m.ReturnType.ToString(),
                            Accessibility = msym?.DeclaredAccessibility.ToString() ?? "",
                            Modifiers = m.Modifiers.Select(mm => mm.ValueText).ToList(),
                            Parameters = msym?.Parameters.Select(Param).ToList() ?? new List<ParameterInfo>(),
                            Calls = new List<string>(),  // TODO: call graph
                            Reads = new List<string>(),  // TODO
                            Writes = new List<string>()  // TODO
                        });
                    }
                    // properties
                    foreach (var prp in td.Members.OfType<PropertyDeclarationSyntax>())
                    {
                        var psym = model.GetDeclaredSymbol(prp) as IPropertySymbol;
                        mb.Properties.Add(new PropertyInfo
                        {
                            Id = $"{t.Id}.{psym?.Name ?? prp.Identifier.ValueText}",
                            Name = psym?.Name ?? prp.Identifier.ValueText,
                            Type = psym?.Type?.ToDisplayString() ?? prp.Type.ToString(),
                            Accessibility = psym?.DeclaredAccessibility.ToString() ?? "",
                            HasGetter = prp.AccessorList?.Accessors.Any(a => a.IsKind(SyntaxKind.GetAccessorDeclaration)) ?? false,
                            HasSetter = prp.AccessorList?.Accessors.Any(a => a.IsKind(SyntaxKind.SetAccessorDeclaration)) ?? false
                        });
                    }
                    // fields
                    foreach (var fld in td.Members.OfType<FieldDeclarationSyntax>())
                    {
                        foreach (var v in fld.Declaration.Variables)
                        {
                            var fsym = model.GetDeclaredSymbol(v) as IFieldSymbol;
                            mb.Fields.Add(new FieldInfo
                            {
                                Id = $"{t.Id}.{fsym?.Name ?? v.Identifier.ValueText}",
                                Name = fsym?.Name ?? v.Identifier.ValueText,
                                Type = fsym?.Type?.ToDisplayString() ?? fld.Declaration.Type.ToString(),
                                Accessibility = fsym?.DeclaredAccessibility.ToString() ?? "",
                                Modifiers = fld.Modifiers.Select(mm => mm.ValueText).ToList()
                            });
                        }
                    }
                    // events
                    foreach (var ev in td.Members.OfType<EventFieldDeclarationSyntax>())
                    {
                        var typeStr = ev.Declaration.Type.ToString();
                        foreach (var v in ev.Declaration.Variables)
                        {
                            mb.Events.Add(new EventInfo
                            {
                                Id = $"{t.Id}.{v.Identifier.ValueText}",
                                Name = v.Identifier.ValueText,
                                HandlerType = typeStr,
                                Accessibility = "" // could map from symbol; MVP leaves blank
                            });
                        }
                    }

                    t.Members = mb;

                    // Hashes
                    var (apiHash, fullHash) = HashesForType(td, model);
                    t.Hashes = new TypeHashes { PublicApiHash = apiHash, FullTypeHash = fullHash };

                    // Relationships (MVP: inheritance + implements)
                    if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(t.BaseType))
                        t.Relationships.Add(new Relationship { Kind = "inherits", TargetId = t.BaseType, Via = "baseType" });
                    foreach (var itf in t.Implements)
                        t.Relationships.Add(new Relationship { Kind = "implements", TargetId = itf, Via = "interface" });

                    p.Types.Add(t);
                }
            }

            // simple project-level edges from type relationships (MVP)
            foreach (var t in p.Types)
            {
                foreach (var r in t.Relationships)
                    p.Edges.Add(new Edge { SourceId = t.Id, TargetId = r.TargetId, Kind = r.Kind });
            }

            // de-dupe namespaces/files
            p.Namespaces = p.Namespaces.Distinct().OrderBy(x => x).ToList();
            p.Files = p.Files.Distinct().OrderBy(x => x).ToList();

            arch.Projects.Add(p);
        }

        Directory.CreateDirectory(Path.GetDirectoryName(outJson)!);
        File.WriteAllText(outJson, JsonConvert.SerializeObject(arch, Formatting.Indented), Encoding.UTF8);
        Console.WriteLine($"Wrote: {outJson}");
    }

    // ===== helpers =====

    private static string TryGetXmlSummary(ISymbol? sym)
    {
        if (sym == null) return "";
        var xml = sym.GetDocumentationCommentXml(expandIncludes: true, cancellationToken: default);
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(xml)) return "";
        // ultra-simple strip; keep raw for now
        return xml;
    }

    private static SourceLocation MakeSourceLocation(TypeDeclarationSyntax td)
    {
        var span = td.GetLocation().GetLineSpan();
        return new SourceLocation
        {
            File = span.Path,
            Span = new TextSpan
            {
                StartLine = span.StartLinePosition.Line + 1,
                StartCol = span.StartLinePosition.Character + 1,
                EndLine = span.EndLinePosition.Line + 1,
                EndCol = span.EndLinePosition.Character + 1
            }
        };
    }

    private static ParameterInfo Param(IParameterSymbol p)
        => new ParameterInfo { Name = p.Name, Type = p.Type?.ToDisplayString() ?? "object" };

    private static string MethodId(string typeId, IMethodSymbol? m)
    {
        if (m == null) return $"{typeId}.<unknown>()";
        var ps = string.Join(", ", m.Parameters.Select(pp => pp.Type?.ToDisplayString() ?? "object"));
        return $"{typeId}.{m.Name}({ps})";
    }

    private static (string apiHash, string fullHash) HashesForType(TypeDeclarationSyntax td, SemanticModel model)
    {
        // public API hash: signatures only (type + members names, params, return types)
        var sbApi = new StringBuilder();
        var sym = model.GetDeclaredSymbol(td) as INamedTypeSymbol;
        sbApi.AppendLine(sym?.ToDisplayString() ?? td.Identifier.Text);
        foreach (var m in td.Members.OfType<MethodDeclarationSyntax>())
        {
            var msym = model.GetDeclaredSymbol(m) as IMethodSymbol;
            var sig = $"{msym?.DeclaredAccessibility} {msym?.ReturnType?.ToDisplayString()} {msym?.Name}({string.Join(", ", msym?.Parameters.Select(p => p.Type?.ToDisplayString()) ?? Array.Empty<string>())})";
            sbApi.AppendLine(sig);
        }
        foreach (var p in td.Members.OfType<PropertyDeclarationSyntax>())
        {
            var psym = model.GetDeclaredSymbol(p) as IPropertySymbol;
            sbApi.AppendLine($"{psym?.DeclaredAccessibility} {psym?.Type?.ToDisplayString()} {psym?.Name} get:{psym?.GetMethod!=null} set:{psym?.SetMethod!=null}");
        }
        foreach (var f in td.Members.OfType<FieldDeclarationSyntax>())
        {
            var typeStr = f.Declaration.Type.ToString();
            foreach (var v in f.Declaration.Variables)
                sbApi.AppendLine($"{typeStr} {v.Identifier.ValueText}");
        }

        var apiHash = Sha256(sbApi.ToString());

        // full hash: include the full text of the node
        var fullHash = Sha256(td.ToFullString());
        return (apiHash, fullHash);
    }

    private static string Sha256(string s)
    {
        using var sha = SHA256.Create();
        var bytes = sha.ComputeHash(Encoding.UTF8.GetBytes(s ?? ""));
        var sb = new StringBuilder(bytes.Length * 2);
        foreach (var b in bytes) sb.Append(b.ToString("x2"));
        return sb.ToString();
    }

    private static class GitProbe
    {
        public static GitInfo TryProbe(string repoRoot)
        {
            try
            {
                string Run(string args)
                {
                    var p = new System.Diagnostics.Process();
                    p.StartInfo.FileName = "git";
                    p.StartInfo.Arguments = args;
                    p.StartInfo.WorkingDirectory = repoRoot;
                    p.StartInfo.CreateNoWindow = true;
                    p.StartInfo.UseShellExecute = false;
                    p.StartInfo.RedirectStandardOutput = true;
                    p.Start();
                    var o = p.StandardOutput.ReadToEnd().Trim();
                    p.WaitForExit(2000);
                    return o;
                }

                var branch = Safe(() => Run("rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD"));
                var commit = Safe(() => Run("rev-parse --short HEAD"));
                var dirty = !string.IsNullOrEmpty(Safe(() => Run("status --porcelain")));

                return new GitInfo { Branch = branch, Commit = commit, Dirty = dirty };
            }
            catch
            {
                return new GitInfo { Branch = "", Commit = "", Dirty = false };
            }

            static string Safe(Func<string> f) { try { return f(); } catch { return ""; } }
        }
    }

    private static class FileHeaderParser
    {
        public static FileHeader TryParse(Document doc)
        {
            try
            {
                var text = doc.GetTextSynchronously(default).ToString();
                // Very light parse: look for lines like "// Version:" or "// Author:" at top
                var lines = text.Split(new[] { "\r\n", "\n" }, StringSplitOptions.None).Take(50).ToArray();
                string ver = "", author = "", created = "", since = "";
                foreach (var l in lines)
                {
                    var s = l.TrimStart('/', ' ', '\t');
                    if (s.StartsWith("Version", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)) ver = AfterColon(s);
                    else if (s.StartsWith("Author", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)) author = AfterColon(s);
                    else if (s.StartsWith("Created", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)) created = AfterColon(s);
                    else if (s.StartsWith("Since", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)) since = AfterColon(s);
                }
                return new FileHeader { Version = ver, Author = author, Created = created, Since = since };
            }
            catch { return new FileHeader(); }

            static string AfterColon(string s)
            {
                var i = s.IndexOf(':');
                return i >= 0 ? s.Substring(i + 1).Trim() : "";
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

## How to run

```bat
dotnet run --project E:\Development\CBI\Tools\Cbi.ArchMap\Cbi.ArchMap.csproj ^
  E:\Development\Company\CBI\AutoCAD2020\CBI_Tools.sln ^
  E:\Development\Company\CBI\docs\Architecture_Index.json
```

This writes **Architecture_Index.json** conforming to your DTO:

- Fills `solution` (name/path/timestamp/generator + best-effort `git` details).
- Enumerates projects, their references, files, namespaces.
- Emits `types` with kind, accessibility, partial/modifiers, baseType, implements, attributes, **source spans**, **publicApiHash/fullTypeHash**, and **members** (ctors, methods, properties, fields, events).
- Adds relationship edges for `inherits` and `implements` (MVP).  
  (We can expand to `calls/reads/writes` later without breaking the schema.)

If you want, I can also revise the Markdown post-processor to read this **new schema** and render a compact “at-a-glance” Architecture Snapshot for Obsidian.

## Response:
11/13/2025, 12:32:46 PM

Perfect question — and actually, you’re thinking exactly right 👏  

Here’s a clear step-by-step for **your exact situation** (building a standalone support tool outside AutoCAD).  

---

## ✅ GOAL
You’re creating a **new standalone Visual Studio solution** that contains one or more small .NET 8 console apps (like `Cbi.ArchMap`) that scan and output reports about your AutoCAD solutions — they don’t run *inside* AutoCAD.

That means:
- ❌ No AutoCAD SDK references needed  
- ✅ You can use any modern .NET (6 or 8 recommended)  
- ✅ You can keep everything lightweight, fast, and independent  

---

## 🧱 Step-by-Step Setup

### 1️⃣ Create a new blank solution
From the screen in your photo:
1. Choose **“Blank Solution”** (bottom left in the list).
2. Name it  
   ```
   CBI_Tools_Analyzer
   ```
3. Location:  
   ```
   E:\Development\CBI\Tools\
   ```
4. Click **Create**.  
   (You’ll see an empty solution in Solution Explorer — perfect.)

---

### 2️⃣ Add your first project
Right-click the new solution → **Add → New Project…**

1. Select **“Console App”** (the top item on your screen).  
2. Name it  
   ```
   Cbi.ArchMap
   ```
3. Framework → pick **.NET 8.0** (or 6.0 if you prefer LTS).
4. Click **Create**.

That gives you a starter `Program.cs` with “Hello World!”.  

---

### 3️⃣ Add a second project (optional later)
When ready, add another console app for post-processing:
```
Cbi.ArchMap.Post
```
(Same steps as above.)

---

### 4️⃣ Add the code
Copy in:
- `ArchitectureIndexDto.cs`
- The long `Program.cs` I provided
- `Cbi.ArchMap.csproj` contents (you can just open the `.csproj` and replace its `<Project>` XML with mine)

---

### 5️⃣ Set startup project
Right-click **Cbi.ArchMap** → **Set as Startup Project**  
Now F5 or Ctrl + F5 will run that analyzer.

---

### 6️⃣ Test-run
Use a PowerShell or cmd prompt (or Visual Studio terminal):

```bash
dotnet run --project E:\Development\CBI\Tools\Cbi.ArchMap\Cbi.ArchMap.csproj ^
  E:\Development\Company\CBI\AutoCAD2020\CBI_Tools.sln ^
  E:\Development\Company\CBI\docs\Architecture_Index.json
```

After a minute or two you’ll see:
```
Wrote: E:\Development\Company\CBI\docs\Architecture_Index.json
```

🎉 That JSON is your full architecture snapshot.

---

### 7️⃣ Later add post-processor
Add a second console project (`Cbi.ArchMap.Post`) that reads the JSON and emits Markdown summaries for your Obsidian vault.

---

## 💡 In short

| Purpose | Template | Framework | Notes |
|----------|-----------|------------|-------|
| Root solution | **Blank Solution** | — | purely a container |
| Analyzer app | **Console App** | .NET 8 | no AutoCAD refs |
| (optional) Post app | **Console App** | .NET 8 | reads JSON → Markdown |

---

## Response:
11/13/2025, 12:46:25 PM

No need to apologize at all — that’s actually **a great question**, and it shows you’re thinking carefully about what belongs where. 👍  

Let’s clear this up cleanly:

---

### 🧩 You have *two* separate kinds of files here:
| Type | Example filename | Purpose |
|------|------------------|----------|
| **Project file (.csproj)** | `Cbi.ArchMap.csproj` | Tells Visual Studio what libraries and framework to use. |
| **Source file (.cs)** | `ArchitectureIndexDto.cs`, `Program.cs` | Your actual C# code that gets compiled. |

---

### ✅ What you should do:
You **do not** copy my `.csproj` XML into `ArchitectureIndexDto.cs`.  
Instead, you have to edit the small file named:

```
Cbi.ArchMap.csproj
```

That file already exists because Visual Studio made it when you created the Console App.

1. In **Solution Explorer**, find:
   ```
   Cbi.ArchMap
   ├─ Dependencies
   ├─ Program.cs
   └─ Cbi.ArchMap.csproj
   ```
2. Right-click `Cbi.ArchMap.csproj` → **Open With → XML (Text) Editor**.
3. Replace everything inside with this:

   ```xml
   <Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">
     <PropertyGroup>
       <OutputType>Exe</OutputType>
       <TargetFramework>net8.0</TargetFramework>
       <Nullable>enable</Nullable>
       <ImplicitUsings>enable</ImplicitUsings>
     </PropertyGroup>

     <ItemGroup>
       <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.Build.Locator" Version="1.6.10" />
       <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.Workspaces.MSBuild" Version="4.10.0" />
       <PackageReference Include="Newtonsoft.Json" Version="13.0.3" />
     </ItemGroup>
   </Project>
   ```

   (This tells it to include Roslyn and Newtonsoft.Json, which the analyzer uses.)

4. Save and close the `.csproj` file.

---

### 🧱 Your project folder should now look like:
```
E:\Development\CBI\Tools\Cbi.ArchMap\
│
├─ ArchitectureIndexDto.cs   ← (the big DTO file you pasted)
├─ Program.cs                ← (the analyzer logic I provided)
└─ Cbi.ArchMap.csproj        ← (the XML file above)
```

---

### ✅ After that:
Just hit **Build → Rebuild Solution**  
If everything restores NuGet packages successfully, you’re ready to run.

---

Would you like me to show a screenshot-style text layout of how the Solution Explorer should look (exact file tree and icons)? It might help confirm you’re set up right before you hit “Build.”
